programme.desc: Evidence tells investigators that a woman was thrown over the side of a bridge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Constructive Critcism
programme.desc: When a man is found dead, having been stabbed 46 times, and police are stuck sifting through the DNA. After an arduous search, they find their killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fashion Police
programme.desc: A victim had been stabbed more than thirty times, and the only evidence investigators had was a distinctive button found at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Church Dis-Service
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services... then disappears. Eyewitnesses place her at a nearby gas station, getting into a van. Three days later when her body is discovered, the search for the driver of that van intensifies.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fresh Heir
programme.desc: In the 20 years following an unsolved murder, lives changed and so did forensic science. In time, a high-powered microscope and DNA profiling revealed a clue no one had seen before.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ticker Tape
programme.desc: A victim's autopsy turns an investigation into a landmark forensics case: the device intended to save his life proved to be the only witness to his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Smiley Face
programme.desc: A woman is assaulted and stabbed nearly 30 times by an unknown assailant. Within days police hone in on a suspect who all but admits to the crime. As the trial approaches, DNA test results stun prosecutors and the suspect is released.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dirty Laundry
programme.desc: A Northern Kentucky businessman is shot to death at his home in front of his wife. Police launch a massive manhunt to find the culprit, but their efforts were futile. A baseball bat and forensic investigation break the case wide open.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million

programme.title: Forensic Files: Family Ties
programme.desc: An esteemed couple is brutally attacked in their home, leaving one dead and the other gravely injured. The survivor identifies the killer but recants her admission leaving investigators probing for answers. A DNA hit captures the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trouble Brewing

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion

programme.title: Shark Tank
programme.desc: The Sharks try to talk Barbara out of a bad deal. Kevin O'Leary takes a bet on a pet product. Other pitches include a virtual arcade and a clothing designer.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Don't Look Now/ Séance Schméance
programme.desc: SpongeBob holds a séance at the Krusty Krab to learn the recipe for a long-lost sandwich. Then, SpongeBob and Patrick go to see the latest horror film, only to be seemingly stalked by the villain.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Place for Pets/ Lockdown for Love
programme.desc: Customers bring pets into Krusty Krab, and Mr. Krabs learns pets are more profitable than owners. And, when Plankton ruins a date with Karen, she puts the Chum Bucket on lockdown until he can show affection.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Man Ray Returns/ Larry the Floor Manager
programme.desc: When Man Ray rents Squidward's house for the weekend, it's up to SpongeBob and Patrick to stop his evil vacation. Mr. Krabs takes a vacation and makes Larry the Lobster the temporary manager of the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Biddy Sitting/Jolly Lodgers
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick get tricked into babysitting a grouchy old lady, who does all she can to escape.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: A surprise from Schowz's mom might cause Mika to fail her test on not snitching.

programme.title: Danger Force: Chapa's Crush
programme.desc: When Chapa's distraction with a crush causes the Danger Force to fail a mission, the gang bust find her obsession to get her back to her normal self.

programme.title: Danger Force: Return of the Kid
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Thousand Pranks War: Part I
programme.desc: An ancient Prank War re-ignites between Swellview and Rivalton, and ShoutOut’s excellent sense for pranking is Danger Force’s best hope for winning the conflict.

programme.title: Danger Force: The Thousand Pranks War: Part II
programme.desc: Captain Man and Schwoz have a new group of four young superheroes to train.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Pineapple and the Bosom of Male Friendship
programme.desc: After being released from the mental hospital, Dr. Sturgis unexpectedly breaks up with Meemaw.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Parasol and a Hell of An Arm
programme.desc: A church carnival leads Missy to try out for the baseball team. Also, Meemaw struggles after her breakup with Dr. Sturgis.

programme.title: Friends: The One After the Super Bowl
programme.desc: Chandler is left in a restaurant wearing only underwear; Rachel and Monica have a fight.

programme.title: Friends: The One With the Prom Video
programme.desc: Ross is determined to make Rachel see they should be together. An old video from Monica’s prom surfaces and Rachel sees how much Ross has always loved her. Joey buys Chandler a gold bracelet as a thank you gift.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Ross and Rachel ...You Know
programme.desc: Monica is attracted to an old family friend. Ross and Rachel have their first date.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Joey Moves Out
programme.desc: Phoebe talks Rachel into getting a tattoo with her and then chickens out; Joey moves out.

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Eddie Moves In
programme.desc: Chandler gets a strange new roommate and Phoebe gets the chance to record 'Smelly Cat.'

programme.title: Friends: The One Where Dr. Ramoray Dies
programme.desc: Joey is finding success in playing Dr. Drake Ramoray on TV series 'Days of Our Lives'. He even has an interview published in TV magazine. Unfortunately, he also makes the mistake of telling the journalist he made up most of his own lines for the show.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: The Sin of Greed and a Chimichanga From Chi-Chi’s
programme.desc: The University makes George Sr. a lucrative job offer in the hopes of recruiting Sheldon. Also, Georgie gets a job working for Meemaw’s new boyfriend, and Mary is determined to rid her home of greed.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: A Party Invitation, Football Grapes and An Earth Chicken
programme.desc: Mary gets Pastor Jeff involved when Sheldon isn’t invited to Billy’s birthday party. George Sr. has 'male-bonding time' with Dr. Sturgis.

programme.title: Young Sheldon: Teenager Soup and a Little Ball of Fib
programme.desc: Sheldon fakes being sick to avoid a swim test at school. Also, Dr. Sturgis spies on Meemaw’s new boyfriend.

programme.title: Mom: Skippy and the Knowledge Hole
programme.desc: Christy finds it challenging to quit smoking, while Bonnie helps Tammy prepare to take the GED test.

programme.title: Mom: A Dark Closet and Therapy With Horses
programme.desc: Bonnie reluctantly consults a therapist, Trevor, for help with her ADD, and Christy battles her urge to gamble on sports while helping out at the bar.

programme.title: Mom: Soup Town and a Little Blonde Mongoose
programme.desc: When Christy gets sick, Bonnie is consumed with an overwhelming urge to mother her.

programme.title: Mom: Lumbar Support and Old Pork
programme.desc: Bonnie has an unexpected reaction when she learns that Adam’s bar is doing well. Also, Christy and Tammy go on a double date.

programme.title: Full House: Birthday Blues
programme.desc: D.J. forgets about Kimmy's 16th birthday until the last minute and plans a party for her.

programme.title: Full House: Be True to Your Pre-School
programme.desc: Jesse lies on a pre-school application in order to enrol his twins in an advanced class.

programme.title: Full House: Silence Is Not Golden
programme.desc: A schoolmate admits to Stephanie that his father beats him and she promises not to tell.

programme.title: Full House: Please Don't Touch the Dinosaur
programme.desc: Michelle's class ends up almost destroying a dinosaur exhibit on a museum field trip.

programme.title: Full House: Subterranean Graduation Blues
programme.desc: Jesse graduates from night school and is chosen to give a speech at the graduation.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Chocolate With Nuts/ Superfriends
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Pat make extra money when they decide to sell chocolate bars door to door. Also, Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy get into an fight.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: No Weenies Allowed/ Squilliam Returns
programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to get into the Salty Spitoon; Squidward's old rival comes to town.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Game On!
programme.desc: It's not all fun and games when Devon's favourite video game is brought to life in the form of a new Robotron.

programme.title: Power Rangers Beast Morphers: Artist Anonymous
programme.desc: Ravi secretly repaints a local art mural, but a strange artist arrives and claims the work as his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Picture Day/ Pat No Pay/ Blackjack
programme.desc: SpongeBob must attend Picture Day for the Boating School Year Book; Patrick steals.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: High Sea Diving/ Bottle Burglars
programme.desc: SpongeBob wants to be the first sponge to dive all the way up to the surface of the ocean. When SpongeBob Squidward accidentally let Plankton steal the secret formula, it's up to them to steal it back.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Spongebob BC
programme.desc: Thanks to the magic of an underwater thunderstorm, our neanderthal friends discover fire.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Executive Treatment / Squid Plus One
programme.desc: While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business. Later, Squidward receives an invitation to a gallery opening and scrambles to find a friend to take with him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Bucket/Squid's on a Bus
programme.desc: Plankton clones himself and Mr. Krabs, and Squidward switches jobs with a school bus driver, but SpongeBob and Patrick climb aboard.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Cave Dwelling Sponge/ The Clam Whisperer
programme.desc: When a prehistoric Sponge is unfrozen, he causes chaos all over town, and only SpongeBob can communicate with him. A flock of clams descend on Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Appointment TV/ Karen's Virus
programme.desc: The long-lost episode of Mermaid Man is finally showing on TV, but SpongeBob may not make it home in time to watch. Karen gets a computer virus, and it's up to SpongeBob to get it out of her.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Just One Bite/ The Bully
programme.desc: SpongeBob becomes obsessed with the idea that Squid must try a Krabby Patty.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Krabby Patty Creature Feature/ Teacher's Pests
programme.desc: A new secret Krabby Patty formula has disastrous results for Bikini Bottom, and only SpongeBob can save the day. Mr. Krabs and Plankton have to take boating school classes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Eek, an Urchin!/ Squid's Defense
programme.desc: Squidward wants SpongeBob and Sandy to teach him karate after being robbed of his groceries. SpongeBob goes to great lengths to force out a pesky sea urchin from the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Krusty Slammer/ Pineapple RV
programme.desc: When Plankton breaks the law, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into a jailhouse.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: FarmerBob/ Gary and Spot
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick work on Old Man Jenkins' farm. And, Sandy narrates the adventures of Gary and Spot.

programme.desc: A freak car accident leaves a man unable to move and fighting for his life, just a few hundred feet from a busy Houston highway.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Beat Up and Bloody

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: We're Jumping In

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: Taking a Deep Breath
programme.desc: A young operator faces a toxic mess when a tanker bursts open. Gary reacts fast when he spots a dangerous mistake on the road. A rookie takes the controls for his first heavy job.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: There's Always Fear
programme.desc: Steve’s crew battles a fiery wreck in the heart of Toronto. A newly-promoted rotator operator gest his first big test when freezing rain ices up the highway around London.

programme.title: Highway Thru Hell: Dead Man's Curve
programme.desc: Al Quiring and Gord Boyd are launched into battle when a snowstorm paralyzes the Coquihalla Summit. Jamie Davis and a new operation tackle a torn-up semi on a dangerous corner.

programme.title: Heavy Rescue: 401: A Big Problem

programme.desc: After a teenager is found murdered in a city park, rookie detective Andre Lowe must find the truth behind the crime. The Homicide Unit and the public, the team scour over possible leads. The victim's car is found miles away, complicating things.

programme.title: The First 48 Presents: Homicide Squad Atlanta: Secrets & Lies

programme.title: Hoarders: Al/ Julie
programme.desc: Al's hoarding has him facing $2,500 a day in fines by the county. Julie's hoarding is so bad, no one realized a homeless woman was living among the mounds of stuff in her basement.

programme.title: Hoarders: Jim/ Susan
programme.desc: Jim and his wife will be homeless and the grandchildren that he has custody of will become wards of the state if he doesn't clean his home. Susan's daughter is threatening to call Protective Services if her mom doesn't clean up.

programme.title: Hoarders: Randy/ Vicki
programme.desc: Randy's boardwalk memorabilia collection fills a 20,000 square foot building and numerous tractor trailers. Vicki's hoarding is breaking up her family.

programme.title: Hoarders: Dennis
programme.desc: As a retired architect, Dennis sees the value in repurposing and using materials for all types of projects, but it has led Dennis to collect a massive hoard.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A dozen security guards try to subdue an enraged man; a tearful mother forgives her son's killer; two tasers can't stop a defendant desperate for freedom.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: Chaos ensues during a brawl in a courtroom; a bailiff dives down a flight of stairs after an escapee; a defendant threatens a judge's life.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A murderer and a judge square off, a defendant does the unthinkable and a bailiff tries to go above the law.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A ruthless teen killer taunts the family of his victims, a judge tosses a lawyer in jail and an alleged rapist tries to escape a life sentence.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A distraught family member seeks revenge for the murder of his nephew, a mouthy defendant talks his way into hail and a drunken lawyer tries to slur his way out of trouble.

programme.title: Movie: The Rundown
programme.desc: A bounty hunter teams up with a mob boss's son in order to retrieve a legendary artifact.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: Top Secret Videos: Mirror - Interns
programme.desc: The Interns meet some unsettling outsiders and learn just how deep the NSA Internship program goes.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: Find out which joker always brings a bag of dental hygiene products to set, why Q changed into cargo pants in a store window and where the art department found the turquoise ring.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pulling the Rug
programme.desc: Find out where Joe originally wanted to play hide n' seek, what Q's favourite dessert is, and what the crew was most afraid of during Murr's wig-pulling punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Card Against Humanity
programme.desc: Find out which Jokers really wear glasses, how Q was injured the last time he wore his talking brush disguise and what Sal's sole business card actually says.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Washed Up
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr rat each other out at a pizza place and get into textual relationships with strangers at the mall. Then, the big loser twerks hard for the money at an impromptu bikini car wash.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper
programme.desc: Sal, Q, Joe and Murr are at Universal Studios in Hollywood. They start off serving up ridiculous surveys, then make things awkward while posing as maintenance workers. Plus, tonight’s big loser can't catch a break…no matter how many times he tries.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prize Fighter
programme.desc: The guys get their checks bounced by customers who notice unusual charges, then help out coworkers with some peculiar trust exercises. Later, the big loser finds himself deep at a carnival game that's rigged for him to lose.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Four Meals, One Color Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe eat a meal that can only be one color, and Patty Jenkins helps determine if Murr is a bad husband.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Holiday Meals Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe reminisce about their Christmas past. Joe surprises everyone with a holiday-themed wardrobe request.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Bull Shiatsu
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what word Joe uses as slang for cash, which prop did Q have to handle with care and how Joe managed to keep cool during his chair punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Super Saturn Moon Travel
programme.desc: Tonight, Michael's got exploding fruit, levitation sparklers and a discovery in hemp technology. Plus, a time capsule totally blows one man's mind.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Pixelated Vision
programme.desc: Michael reels in customers with a new fishing tool and shows off a camera that's literally paper thin. Plus, a day of mini golf turns explosive.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Italian Food Matter
programme.desc: Michael uncovers ancient secrets at an Asian gift shop, reveals a transformative spray at Eataly and leaves his assistant speechless at a photo shoot.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue
programme.desc: At an antique store, Michael shows off an impossible way to organize your clothes, and back at the supermarket we find out that there are some serious surprises lurking in our favorite foods.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Back in Time
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael revisits a spirits-drinking spirit, a living fossil, rewrites history again and more with brand-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to Fight or Flight
programme.desc: Michael jumps back in time and unleashes unseen content for a fresh spin on classic Carbonaro bits. Michael reanimates a chameleon fish, reboots lengthy corks, remakes the airport bird man, and more with all-new reactions.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Ice
programme.desc: Michael rehashes a potato laser, re-designs an emergen-suit, and takes another shot on the ice and more.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Double Takes: Back to the Meet and Greet
programme.desc: Michael Carbonaro performs magic tricks on unsuspecting victims, all caught on camera.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Outrageous Surprises
programme.desc: Watch as a Russian road explosion creates the world's biggest pothole. Then, two kids pull off a prank that really 'bugs' their mom.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Epic Fails
programme.desc: Watch as a speeding car takes out a snowman and a plow takes out a newsman. Plus, a showcase of hidden talents with a musical finger snapper and a child who conducts an entire church choir.

programme.title: TruTV's Top Funniest: Frolics and Follies
programme.desc: Watch a group of heavy metal rockers turn into extreme home decorators. Also, a forklift, a car and a seesaw come together in an epic stunt. Plus, women turn the tables on men with some side-splitting pranks.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Spider Man
programme.desc: The guys give all-you-can-eat buffet customers all they can handle, and turn into real power tools while teaching workshops at a hardware store. Then, tonight's big loser suffers a punishment that will make your skin crawl.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lady and the Tramp
programme.desc: The guys us a two-way mirror to get each other to crack, and tonight's loser gets taken for a ride that ends at the Statue of Liberty.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: X Man
programme.desc: The guys compete in their first four-way challenge. Later, see what happens when they try to lead a kid's art class, and which loser fails so badly that he's hit with an on-the-spot punishment that leaves him seeing red.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Vampire Weakened
programme.desc: The guys act frosty while working the ice cream counter, then take Joe's dogs for a romp in the park with help from some strangers. Later, tonight's loser watches his blood boil while performing with a gospel choir.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drum and Drummer
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Q and Joe convince shoppers to repeat odd catch phrases, then go mental as psychoanalysts. Plus, tonight's losers perform at a halftime show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Stuffed Turkey
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Joe and Murr act as not-so-handy-men assembling furniture. Thanksgiving comes early for tonight's loser when he must talk turkey at a dating event.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crickets
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Q and Joe head to Joey Fatone's hot dog joint to dish up weenies, and tonight's big loser performs a stand-up comedy routine but barely gets out alive.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Kickin' It in Cancun
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's headin' south of the border to dig into Cancun cuisine, like an authentic, family-owned spot where grandma's cookin' up real-deal rellenos and killer chicharron gorditas.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Far East Flavorfest
programme.desc: Guy Fieri cruises the States to check out some Far-East flavours. In Seattle, a funky chicken spot puts an Asian spin on poultry. A family-run gem dishes out righteous Thai specialties on the big island of Hawaii.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A Sampling Of Spain
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels all the way to Barcelona, Spain, for a sampling of Spanish cooking. He digs into everything from top-notch tapas, like prawns and quail, to traditional Catalan specialties, like mouth-watering meatballs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Mega Meat and Sweet Treats
programme.desc: Guy Fieri dives into mega meat and a little bit of sweet. In Atlanta, a Korean-taqueria mashing up unique flavors in their chicken tacos and bulgogi fries.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Top Ten Burgers
programme.desc: Guy's had a lot of burgers on DDD and we asked you to vote for your Top 10 favourites of all time. From old school to gourmet, it's a countdown of the most creative and delicious combinations found in Flavortown.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real-Deal Diners
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's traveling the country hitting up real-deal diners. From coast to coast and everywhere in-between, these all-American staples are servin' up the bomb breakfasts and classic comfort food, with a few surprises mixed into the menu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Beef, Lamb And Pig
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's going for all kinds of meaty favourites. In Louisville, Kentucky, a real-deal Irish pub serves up cottage pie and a lamb-cabbage specialty. In Charlotte, North Carolina, a funky spot puts out flavourful Asian-barbecue fusion.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seaside Eats
programme.desc: Menu includes: fried clams; crab cakes; lobster chow mein.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: In the Family
programme.desc: Guy Fieri checks out a Baltimore diner that's famous for their pit beef with Duff Goldman.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Beef And Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy goes to Orlando to visit an authentic Vietnamese spot serving phenomenal pho and a beefy specialty, and to Palm Springs to visit an atypical burger joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Surf and Turf
programme.desc: It's a mix of land and sea as Guy Fieri pops into a few favourite spots across the country. In Portland, Ore., a chef full of personality is still making people smile with seafood for breakfast, lunch and dinner.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Triple D Nation: Wings 'n' Things
programme.desc: Ain't no thing but a chicken wing in Coeur d'Alene, Idaho, when Guy Fieri stops by to taste a couple of new eats they've added. A Nashville barbecue spot has a new take on the old standard wings.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Handy Helpings
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri grabs a fistful of righteous hand-held toppings starting with a kolach cafe in Salt Lake City cooking up their Czech specialties with some sweetness and comfort.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Home and Away
programme.desc: Guy tries favourites in Chicago, a Peruvian place and visits Oklahoma City.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Breakfast for Supper
programme.desc: Trisha and her friend Donna make some easy to assemble breakfast dishes, that are hearty enough for dinner.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Lunch With Aunt T
programme.desc: When Trisha Yearwood's niece Ashley first moved to Nashville, she would text Aunt T for recipe ideas and ways to make meals that last on a college student's budget. They're demonstrating these recipes and showing incredible ways to meal prep for the week.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Lazy Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: Valerie and her husband create a lazy Sunday meal that allows them to use up food in their fridge in order to save time and money. The menu includes pot roast with veggies, green beans with shallots, stuffed mushrooms, and apricot clafouti.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Cook Once, Eat for a Week
programme.desc: On Sundays, Valerie Bertinelli loves to make a big pot of her Nonnie's favourite marinara sauce and repurpose it all week in modern interpretations of her Nonnie's most-memorable weeknight meals.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Home Sweet Home: Underappreciated
programme.desc: Ree Drummond shines a spotlight on unsung hero ingredients. Canned foods reveal hidden talents in her Salmon burgers and spam fried rice. Then Ree uses a freezer star in a spinach mushroom quiche, and a baking mix takes the lead in chocolate chip scones.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Other Cuts Of Beef
programme.desc: Ree's transforming random cuts of beef into four delicious dishes. She's turning stew beef into slow cooker Sunday stew and serving it with fabulous buttery parsley lemon noodles.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Cheap And Easy
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has been stocking up for four make-ahead meals that are as cheap as they are easy to make. There's inexpensive slow cooker teriyaki ribs with quick slaw, Tex-Mex meatballs, BBQ chicken baked potatoes and a cheesy rigatoni pepper bake.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Waste Not, Want Not
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is reclaiming kitchen scraps and transforming them into star dishes. Peels, stems and bones destined for the trash are instead turned into crispy roasted potato peels, stir fried broccoli stems and an awesome all-purpose chicken broth.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Picnic Blowout
programme.desc: Molly Yeh starts the day off with cheesy breakfast juicy Lucys for herself and her husband, Nick. Then she assembles a picnic with pickle dip fried bologna sandwiches, falafel-y farfalle and colorful tie-dye cookies.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Money Savers
programme.desc: Trisha's nephews return to the kitchen to learn some budget-friendly & belly-filling recipes. Trisha shows how to stretch a dollar with dishes including garlic popcorn, breakfast burritos, PBJ smoothies, Thai peanut butter ramen & peanut butter mug cake.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Double as Nice for Half the Price
programme.desc: Kardea Bown cooks up her cousin's favorite restaurant meal, all for under $30! On the menu is a starter of sea island beer steamed mussels and a main course of penne with sausage and greens. For dessert, there's homemade molten chocolate cakes.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Fancy for Less
programme.desc: Kardea invites her notoriously frugal Aunt TC over for a dinner that looks like a million bucks but won't break the bank! For their fancy meal at home, Kardea makes Molasses Salmon, Mushroom and Pea Risotto, and Wilted Bok Choy.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Price Crunch Challenge
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts compete to make the most-affordable meal that doesn't skimp on flavour. Alex Guarnaschelli starts the competition with her meaty, cheesy stuffed peppers and Geoffrey Zakarian makes breakfast for dinner with a family-sized omelette.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Cash Strapped
programme.desc: Alex Guarnaschelli challenges four chefs to transport the judges from the hot asphalt to a tropical paradise. Then, the chefs' fate is in their own hands to create a handheld dish, and the last two standing whip up sweet treats.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Resolution Royale
programme.desc: Four chefs arrive in Flavortown ready to prove that traditionally unhealthy dishes can be made healthier and even more delicious.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Village of Wolves
programme.desc: Villalobos is tested like never before when Tia and her crew are called upon to rescue a pack of wolf-dog hybrids abandoned by a backyard breeder. With law enforcement threatening to kill the dogs, the pressure is higher than ever.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Dogs Who Made Us
programme.desc: This special episode takes a look at the dogs that will always hold a loving place in the family's hearts. From the first pit bull that Tia rescued to the dog that walked Tania down the aisle, family members share why each dog is so important to them.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: The Sweetest Thing
programme.desc: The family of Mutt, an employee who recently passed away, meets the dog that he chose for them. A stray near a middle school leads Tia and M2 on a wild good chase. And, Lizzy and Moe tackle the challenging task of renovating the dog agility course.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Never Too Late
programme.desc: Lizzy tries to track down the owner of a dog tied up outside the rescue. An older couple comes looking for their first dog, but their choice requires some special temperament testing. And, when a dog develops allergies, Mariah looks for a natural cure.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Twist of Fate
programme.desc: Tia and M2 take to the water to prepare a pit bull for her forever home. A new parolee comes to Villalobos from Boston, hoping stay on track so that he can make his teenage son proud. A stray dog is near death when Lizzy and Heidi find him.

programme.title: Puppy Bowl XVII Presents: Pupularity Playoffs: Week 2
Pit Bulls & Parolees: No Wolf Left Behind
programme.desc: When over 50 hybrid hounds are found abandoned in Texas, Tia is faced with her most challenging rescue to date and is determined to find the best solution before it's too late. At Villalobos, Tania and Mariah help a lonely man adopt a furever friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Home Is Where the Dog Is
programme.desc: One of Earl's favourite senior dogs finally has a chance at a forever home. Tia heads to a small shelter in rural Louisiana to help with a hound that they took in. Tania, Mariah and Lizzy take on a project that showcases dogs in their forever homes.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: No Wolf Left Behind
programme.desc: When over 50 hybrid hounds are found abandoned in Texas, Tia is faced with her most challenging rescue to date and is determined to find the best solution before it's too late. At Villalobos, Tania and Mariah help a lonely man adopt a furever friend.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Out of the Dark
programme.desc: Tia recruits some help to rescue a pit bull for the bottom of a 40-foot hole. Then, Mariah helps Tia with an adoption to a young couple who are still reeling from the loss of their dog.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A New Future
programme.desc: Tia brings in reinforcements to rescue a dog from a dangerous part of New Orleans. Tania is left stunned when she becomes the center of attention at her boyfriend's birthday party.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Almost Perfect
programme.desc: Tia and two parolees scramble to rescue a dog left for dead in a dangerous part of town. A college girl from South Carolina comes looking to adopt a special needs dog. And, the parolees scramble when a dog is dumped on the rescue center's doorstep.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Not Meant to Be
programme.desc: An adopter from Texas fails to connect with the dog he drove hundreds of miles to adopt - but Tia might have the perfect match.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: A Test of Strength
programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Coastal Criminals
programme.desc: Officer James Benvenuti chases down two lobster poachers in Rye. In a puzzling case, Officer Graham Courtney investigates a man on the beach found covered in blood. And Sergeant Adam Cheney attempts to apprehend trespassers on the railroad tracks.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: Officer Egan investigates the mysterious death of a deer. Officer Courtney and Lt. Cheney help a seal stuck in a tidal creek. Officer Bronson catches a young fisherman in a lie. And Officers lead the search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: On the Loose
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau teams up with trainee Masucci to track down a turkey hunter who may have shot from the road. When an animal release goes south, Officer Hannett lends a hand. Then, Officer Canfield races to catch a trespassing dirt biker.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Good News, Bad News
programme.desc: Officers St. Pierre, Benvenuti and K9 Cora investigate a couple accused of road hunting. An actress tries to perform her way out of a ticket with Officer Hannett. Officer Holmes gets an injured goose call and Officer Frye handles a neighbor dispute.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Danger at Dawn
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Benny Richards is committed to conserving Texas wildlife. Game Warden Albert Flores enforces fishing laws. Game Warden Jennifer Provaznik schools anglers. Game Warden Jayme Deschaaf makes sure dove hunters follow the laws.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Drug Run River
programme.desc: Game wardens Gould and Hickerson chase drug smugglers that crossed the Rio Grande River. Game warden Boone checks out an injured bird. Game warden Damron relocates a feisty marsupial and her babies. Amundson and Poole meet a fan.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Calm After the Storm
programme.desc: Game Warden Eddins helps a neighbour in need. Reneau responds to a call about a baby red-tailed hawk. Game Warden Richards attempts to serve an arrest warrant. Game Warden Startz patrols solo on the Guadalupe River. Wardens monitor the Rio Grande.

programme.title: Movie: The Call

programme.title: Movie: When the Bough Breaks

programme.title: Good Bones: Budget-Busting Victorian

programme.desc: The vast mountains, the surrounding oceans and the northerly latitude combine to deliver one of the most extreme winters on the planet.

programme.title: Wild India
programme.desc: India's Wild Karnataka follows some amazing creatures that live across this diverse land. Filmed over three years, dedicated camera teams have captured the wildlife of Karnataka as it has never been seen before.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: Yellowstone freezes solid for six months each year. The severe winter is the greatest challenge facing the Park's animals, but for the wolf, it is the season of opportunity as they stalk ever-weakening prey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Autumn
programme.desc: Autumn is Yellowstone's shortest season and a period of swift change. Conditions change from summer to winter in just two months, forcing animals to leave or prepare for winter.

programme.title: Wild India
programme.desc: India's Wild Karnataka follows some amazing creatures that live across this diverse land. Filmed over three years, dedicated camera teams have captured the wildlife of Karnataka as it has never been seen before.

programme.title: Wild Alaska: Spring

programme.title: James Patterson's Till Murder Do Us Part: The Darkside

programme.title: James Patterson's Till Murder Do Us Part: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Children of God
programme.desc: Prophet David Berg attracts thousands of followers as the Children of God cult spreads through communes around the world. But his free love message turns sinister, espousing prostitution, sexual abuse of children and rampant violence in prison camps.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Cults: Word of Faith
programme.desc: To this day, lost souls flock to North Carolina where they're promised deliverance from demons by Pastor Jane Whaley at the Word of Faith Fellowship. But deliverance comes at a price, including beatings, medical horrors, and psychological abuse.

programme.title: Murder in Ypsilanti: Keith Morrison Investigates
programme.desc: When a young Michigan mother vanishes without a trace, her family, friends and detectives begin a desperate search, but she's never found. Twenty-five years later, a murder leads a reporter to investigate the old case, revealing secrets, old and new.

programme.title: Dateline: Too Fat to Kill
programme.desc: He was a wealthy executive and a doting dad who was in fear for his life. Then, he was shot dead. The case made headlines because of its unusual defense, with the accused arguing he was too obese to carry out the killing.

programme.title: Dateline: Death of a Golden Girl
programme.desc: A playboy model is murdered on New Year's Eve and there are no suspects.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Secrets of a Country Store
programme.desc: As the last dry county in the state of Alabama, Clay County is a place stuck in time. When local bootlegger Billy Triplett and his wife turn up dead in the town of Barfield, locals suspect it must have had something to do with his illegal side-business.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Lookin' for Souls to Steal
programme.desc: When two college students are gunned down while parked in a quiet lovers' lane in Juliette, Georgia, the tiny community is beside itself with panic.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Cowboys From Hell
programme.desc: When Diana Algar and Jose Molina are found brutally murdered in rural Hollenback Township, Pennsylvania, three letters scrawled across Algar's living room wall become the central clue in a nationwide manhunt.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: The Sinner and The Saint
programme.desc: When the sleepy town of Mooresburg, TN receives news that beloved teacher Margaret Jack Sliger is murdered on her farm, Hawkins County detectives are charged with finding the sinister perpetrator to bring their community justice.

programme.title: Murder Comes to Town: Answering the Call
programme.desc: When a brush fire is reported in rural Winchester, TN, first responders are horrified to find the body of young Megan Sharpton at the center of the blaze.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ozark Enchantment
programme.desc: Trying to make her way in the Ozarks, Joy Dishneau set her sights on becoming a small business owner. But when she is found murdered in her own shop, all of her employees become suspects.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Bunkers
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind America's secret bunkers. Ranging from backyard boxes to government mini-cities. Underground bunkers have been a feature of warfare planning since the dawn of time and have played an important role in America's history.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Brothels
programme.desc: Discover the real story behind one of society's most clandestine institutions: brothels. Hidden within these bordellos are secrets about famous patrons, governments, and even religion.

programme.title: Whitey Bulger: Final Takedown
programme.desc: In 1995 ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob
programme.desc: The story of crime boss Charlie 'Lucky' Luciano, who used his Mafia connections to help the U.S. government during the Second World War in return for his parole.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: John Gotti: The Teflon Don
programme.desc: The story of ambitious American mobster John Gotti, who became the boss of the Gambino family by ordering the death of the group's former head. He earned the nickname 'Teflon Don' after three acquittals.

programme.title: Lucky Luciano: Father of the Mob

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Heroes of Tarawa
programme.desc: Everything went wrong in America's first test of whether the Japanese-held islands of the Pacific, the key steppingstones to the doorstep of Japan, could be captured by across-the-beach infantry assaults.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Tojo: Japan's Razor of Fear
programme.desc: Japanese General, Hideki Tojo, is a cold blooded control freak, who takes millions to their deaths in the dirtiest war ever known. This is the story of the dictator responsible for Pearl Harbor, an Asian Holocaust and the torture of thousands of POWs.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles: Tank Battles of Korea
programme.desc: In 1950 the world is caught off guard as North Korea launches a massive armoured assault into South Korea. This is the story of the American tankers who rush to the aid of the South and the bloody battles they fight up and down the Korean Peninsula.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Hitler Strikes East
programme.desc: By the autumn of 1940, Hitler's forces were supreme in Western Europe. Britain remained undefeated but the country was isolated and Hitler no longer considered it a threat. The Fuhrer was ready for his greatest gamble - Operation Barbarossa.

programme.title: World War II in Color: Lightning War
programme.desc: Hitler's armed forces took just four weeks to conquer Poland. Their opponent was not only outnumbered both in men and weapons, but facing a new type of warfare - Lightning War or Blitzkrieg - for which it was totally unprepared.

programme.title: Against the Odds: The Marines at Hue
programme.desc: The city of Hue, South Vietnam, was the site of one of the fiercest battles of the Vietnam War. Three under-strength U.S. Marine battalions, consisting of fewer than 2,500 men, attacked and soundly defeated overwhelming, entrenched enemy troops.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike finds a potential investment for Michael and himself, but the property is three-and-a-half hours away on St. Lawrence River. Things get even trickier as structural issues accumulate, causing stress levels to rise and the budget to go off the rails.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike throws Michael a curveball that has major consequences for their business partnership. The rebuild of the River House continues as they battle muck, rain and snow, and after many stressful months, the property is ready to be revealed.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin in Training
programme.desc: A couple purchased a quaint cabin with an accompanying railroad caboose. The team transform both spaces to create a camp by enlarging the main cabin with more sleeping space and indoor plumbing while the caboose provides more storage and bunk space.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Home for the Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Chase and the team jump at the opportunity to buy a friend's 100-year-old farmhouse in Manchester, ME, and transform it into their headquarters. They plan to create a showroom, offices and a special space where Ashley can design and create custom pieces.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: City Slickers Off the Grid
programme.desc: Chase and his team of builders renovate an off-the-grid camp for a family of city slickers. With limited resources, Chase and his team work to incorporate the comforts of city living into the camp.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Oyster Farm Shack
programme.desc: Ashley Morrill and her team of builders find themselves rebuilding an old oyster shack for a working oyster farm in Edgecomb, Maine.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Teaching an Old Cabin New Tricks
programme.desc: For the past 20 years, a family has created lasting memories of their cabin overlooking Harpswell Sound, but the cabin is in need of some work to see the next 20 years and beyond.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.desc: The team finds cast-iron mantles, a built-in cabinet, and a stained glass front doorway.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Building Alaska, the New Generation
programme.desc: A new generation of builders tackles the Alaskan wilds to build off-the-grid cabins. First-time builder Nick faces some harsh realities when he can't use the trees on his build site for lumber. Brannon's team develops a unique foundation system.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Hard Work Beats Talent
programme.desc: Reality sets in for first-time extreme cabin builder Nick Blanco in Alaska as he fights the tides trying to retrieve pylons for his foundation. Brannon's team gets stuck on the muddy trail bringing in more build materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Noah's Barge
programme.desc: Jere, Ben and Tim put the finishing touches on the biggest project they've undertaken: building a 112-foot floating barge. They struggle with transporting it to the water, and hurricane-force winds change their plans.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Stuck in Shelikof
programme.desc: Nick experiences firsthand just how dangerous living in Alaska can be while hunting for driftwood to build his fishing lodge and warehouse. Jere and Ben's 112-foot barge starts its half-mile journey to the water.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain, Rain, Go Away
programme.desc: Rain and a muddy trail continue to slow down Brannon's cabin build, but despite their dampened spirits, the gang is able to haul the windows across the two-mile trail. Jere and Ben finally get the barge launched.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Honey Bucket
programme.desc: Nick races to finish his cabin before his mom visits again. Bears are still a threat, so Nick makes sure the electric fence is working. Nick and Kent design and build a "honey bucket," also known as an Alaskan toilet.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Home Stretch
programme.desc: All the builders are in the home stretch in Alaska as they try to finish their cabins. Jere and Ben install interior and exterior siding. Nick's roof is dried in, so he turns to finishing the sleeping loft.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Grand Finale
programme.desc: Nick's dad, Paul, returns to help put the finishing touches on the cabin. Brannon's team builds countertops and railings for the cabin, and his client arrives. Jere and Ben put in hard work finishing the new Sea Otter Sound Lodge.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Not-So-Pleasant Camp On Pleasant Pond
programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate a neglected camp for a growing family. Right away, the unusual footprint proves troublesome when trying to create a second bedroom inside.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tortillas Again
programme.desc: Chef/ Scientist Alton Brown shows his love for leftovers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pantry Raid VI: Lentils
programme.desc: Whether it's soup, salad, or baked goods, the lentil has more to offer than fibre, minerals, and a steak's worth of protein.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: The Egg Files
programme.desc: Crack the mysterious egg case and pursue a higher understanding of this amazing ovoid.

programme.title: Good Eats: Reloaded: Flat Is Beautiful II: The Reload
programme.desc: Alton Brown gives the 'reload' treatment to a show about flattened meat dishes, including a new chicken piccata and a chicken Kiev that's actually a schnitzel.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Izard Vs. Blamey
programme.desc: It's the Chairman's special grill battle, and New York burger master, Chef Victoria Blamey, has a beef with Iron Chef Stephanie Izard.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Garces vs. Paley

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Cheat Day
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson gears up for his favourite day of the week- cheat day! It's a full-on sugar and carb overload with everything from cakes to shakes.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Nola
programme.desc: New Orleans charms viewers with its distinct culinary style.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: New York
programme.desc: We're in New York City for a tour of the town's best eats. From Velselka's borscht in the East Village to smoked herring on the Upper West Side.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Philadelphia
programme.desc: We're going to Philadelphia to show you some of the best things we ever ate. There's impossibly delicious pasta at Vetri and perfect mashed potatoes at Parc.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: San Diego
programme.desc: San Diego may be the land of sun, surf and fun, but it's also home to some of the best dining spots around.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Northern California
programme.desc: Andrew visits Northern California where people are re-inventing they way they look at food.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods America: Chicago's Cutting Edge
programme.desc: Andrew explores the driving forces behind the cutting edge food scene in Chicago. From exotic ingredients to innovative techniques, food suppliers in the Windy City are pushing the limits.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Lancaster County
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern celebrates Lancaster County, PA, where farm-to-table dining isn't a trend - it's tradition! Local favorites include pork and sauerkraut, soft pretzels, scrapple, sticky buns and shoofly pie.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Chengdu
programme.desc: From the blistering 'Hot Pot' and fiery Mapo Tofu to spicy Kung Pao Chicken, Andrew Zimmern explores the famous scorching dishes that make Chengdu, China, a delicious destination.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Shanghai
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern introduces the popular tastes of Shanghai, China. From creamy hairy crab and savory pork-filled dumplings to rice wine-soaked chicken and scallion pancakes on the go, cuisine in this big city is sweet and simple.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: San Antonio
programme.desc: Andrew showcases the Tex-Mex favorites of San Antonio, Texas, including puffy tacos and a giant chalupa burger. Other featured foods include slow-cooked brisket, melt-in-your-mouth barbacoa and marinated stuffed quail cooked over mesquite.

programme.desc: Sandy creates the latest acorn-based food sensation, but her tree pays the price for her greed.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Roller Cowards/ Bucket Sweet Bucket
programme.desc: When the scariest roller coaster ever opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park, SpongeBob and Patrick are determined to ride it. But the more they think about it, the less they want to do it. Later, Plankton tricks SpongeBob into fixing the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Help Wanted/ Reef Blowers/ Tea at the Treedome
programme.desc: Bob applies at the Krusty Krab; a mess ends up on Squidward's lawn; meeting Sandy for tea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick Smartpants/ SquidBob Tentaclepants
programme.desc: A knock on the head gives Patrick superior intellect, and Spongebob and Squidward accidentally get melded into one body when Sandy's teleportation machine malfunctions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubblestand/ Ripped Pants
programme.desc: The art of bubble blowing; Bob rips his pants at Mussel Beach.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Masterpiece
programme.desc: Squidward sculpts a statue of Mr. Krabs for The Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Pull Up a Barrel/ Company Picnic
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs regales SpongeBob with tales from his old Navy days. Later, Mr. Krabs throws a company picnic to boost morale, but Plankton is hosting his own on the same day!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Mermaidman Begins/ Plankton's Good Eye
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick learn the secret origins of Mermaid Man and Branacle Boy from the heroes themselves.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: House Sittin' for Sandy/ Smoothe Jazz at Bikini Bottom
programme.desc: All is quiet while SpongeBob is house-sitting for Sandy - until Patrick shows up.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: One Coarse Meal/ Gary in Love
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs finds out that Plankton's afraid of whales. / Gary falls for a snail named Mary.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Jelly Fishing/ Plankton
programme.desc: Spongebob and Patrick take Squidward jelly fishing; Spongebob falls for Plankton's scheme.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Slash and Destroy
programme.desc: The Turtles find themselves being hunted by a new threat: another mutant turtle called Slash, who has a personal vendetta against the brothers.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Kraang Conspiracy
programme.desc: Feeling left out of the action, April insists on joining the Turtles on a mission to TCRI, where they learn a shocking secret about April's past.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Good, the Bad and Casey Jones
programme.desc: After encountering mutants and ninjas, Casey Jones decides to take on 'pure evil' alone. When he meets Raphael, the two hot-headed fighters must put their dislike for each other aside and work together against a common foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Fungus Humungous
programme.desc: A fungus mutant spreading through the sewers causes the Turtles and April to experience their worst fears as Leonardo must face his greatest fear-losing his team.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Metalhead Rewired
programme.desc: When Donnie upgrades Metalhead's artificial intelligence, he must decide if he can trust a sentient Metalhead or if he has created a new foe.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Of Rats and Men
programme.desc: When the Rat King returns, Splinter must overcome his guilt and fear of the Rat King controlling his mind in order to defeat his foe once and for all.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Wormquake!
programme.desc: Facing Shredder's deadly new assassin, Leo must decide whether to risk his brother's lives or ask for Splinter's help. Donnie must put aside his rivalry with Casey in order to uncover a new Kraang plot.

programme.title: Danger Force: Mika in the Middle
programme.desc: A surprise from Schowz's mom might cause Mika to fail her test on not snitching.

programme.title: The Substitute: Peyton List
programme.desc: Celebrities are transformed to go undercover as substitute teachers to surprise a class.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: House Pest
programme.desc: When Miss Croner finds termites have infested her home, she moves in with the chipmunks and drives everyone crazy.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Pack Animal/ The Haunted Getaway
programme.desc: Dave tells Simon to throw out some stuff, and a few of his experiments end up in the wrong hands; Dave and the guys rent a cabin in the woods that might be haunted.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Why You Buggin'?
programme.desc: After discovering that Link's ex-girlfriend is a secret supervillain who wants Link for herself, Phoebe enlists Max's help in exposing her rival's true motives.

programme.title: The Thundermans: Evil Never Sleeps
programme.desc: Phoebe's allegiance is torn when she learns her boyfriend's father might plotting a return to evil, and she must decide whether to take him down.

programme.title: The Thundermans: He Got Game Night
programme.desc: Hank raises the stakes of family game night to a new high, and each member of the family will do whatever it takes to win the grand prize.

programme.title: The Thundermans: I'm Gonna Forget You, Sucka
programme.desc: After Cherry accidently posts a photo revealing the Thundermans' secret, the Hero League forces Phoebe to do the unthinkable and end the relationship with her best friend.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry Hart lands a part-time job as Kid Danger, a superhero sidekick in training.

programme.title: Henry Danger: Grand Theft Otto
programme.desc: Piper's school parrot Otto starts repeating 'Henry is Kid Danger'.

programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Crown on the Ground
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Bully Bust/ Backyard Hodge Podge
programme.desc: Candace challenges Buford to keep the boys' invention from disappearing.

programme.title: The Owl House: Enchanting Grom Fright
programme.desc: Luz experiences Grom, Hexside's version of prom, and it's not what she expects.

programme.title: Amphibia: Reunion
programme.desc: During a banquet hosted by the toads, Anne is reunited with a friend from home.

programme.title: Amphibia: Marcy at the Gates
programme.desc: The family must defeat an entire ant army before they enter Newtopia.

programme.title: DuckTales: Astro B.O.Y.D.!
programme.desc: With Boyd on the fritz, Huey, Gyro, and Fenton travel to Japan to the lab where he was created. However, a secret from Boyd’s past could spell doom for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Mayor for a Day/The Dog Craze of Summer

programme.title: Polaris: Player Select: Pigeon Vision
programme.desc: A compilation of top gaming videos from YouTube stars.

programme.title: Parker Plays: The Return of the Parker
programme.desc: YouTube star Parker Coppins shares his hilarious gameplay commentary.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Return Policy/ Imperfect Storm
programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb assemble a crazy array of batting cage and Doof uses an inator to return things to the store. Mom gets a backyard makeover and calls Candace to come see it, while Doof makes a Have-A-Bad-Day-Inator to rain out a tea party.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Doofapus/ Norm Unleashed
programme.desc: Candace liquefies herself with one of the boys' inventions. Then Phineas and Ferb invent nanobots that can assemble themselves into any object imaginable.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: Once Upon a Swap
programme.desc: A simple disagreement leads to a complex situation when Eda, King, and Luz triple-down on a wager.

programme.title: Amphibia: Swamp and Sensibility/ Wax Museum
programme.desc: When Anne discovers an old friend who has been living a double life, she becomes fixated on helping him be his true self. The family visits a mysterious roadside oddities museum where every treasure comes with a price.

programme.title: Amphibia: Family Fishing Trip/ Bizarre Bazaar
programme.desc: Sprig wants to spend time with Hop Pop on their family fishing trip, but Hop Pop's friend Sylvia gets in the way. Anne's music box goes missing at the mysterious and exclusive Bizarre Bazaar.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Nega-Globby
programme.desc: Honey Lemon sets out to cure Globby and make him human again. However, Big Hero 6 must now face a new different evil glob-like villain.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: The New Nega-Globby / De-Based
programme.desc: Globby and Honey Lemon feel guilty about Nega-Globby being trapped in the Glop-Vac. Basemax gets infected with a virus from a spam email.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: The Lab Rats are on the run and end up as stowaways on a cargo freighter headed to parts unknown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Sink or Swim
programme.desc: The Lab Rats are on the run and end up as stowaways on a cargo freighter headed to parts unknown.

programme.title: Lab Rats: The Jet-Wing
programme.desc: Davenport tries to raise money for a new lab by attempting a death-defying stunt.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Mission: Mission Creek High
programme.desc: Now that she knows their secret, Principal Perry pesters the team to take her on a bionic mission. When they stage a fake mission, things don't go as planned, and they have to save Mission Creek High from a speeding rocket.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Brother Battle
programme.desc: Douglas unlocks new abilities for Adam and Chase that escalate their battle of one-upmanship and disrupt the balance of power on the team.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Principle From Another Planet
programme.desc: Leo is determined to capture the bizarre events he believes take place during a lunar eclipse with his video camera.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Return to the Spider: Verse - Part One
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Kid Arachnid travel to alternate dimensions in order to gather the shards from the broken Siege Perilous.

programme.desc: Spider-Man and Miles, tracking the missing pieces of the Siege Perilous, travel to a tropical pirate dimension, where they meet Web Beard, the Spider-Pirate.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Return to the Spider: Verse - Part Three
programme.desc: Spider-Man and Kid Arachnid arrive in the Noir Universe where they have to prevent Mr. Negative from using the Siege Perilous to drain all the life and color out of the world.

programme.title: Marvel's Ultimate Spider-Man vs. The Sinister 6: Return to the Spider: Verse - Part Four
programme.desc: Spider-Man, having collected all of the shards of the Siege Perilous, returns to Miles Morales’ universe and finally confronts Wolf Spider.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero Battle / Go Go the Wooweroo

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Double Dipper

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Understanding Willow

programme.desc: Kick's newest and terrifying stunt is conquering Dead Man's Drop but Brad interrupts.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Attic-a/ Free Gunther

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: If Books Could Kill/ There Will Be Nachos
programme.desc: Kick challenged a library's return policy after Gunther accidentally brings back a book signed by Kick's idol Billy Stumps. Kick is then determined to crash a party held by Brad, even though he was not invited, in an attempt to score some nachos.

programme.title: Kick Buttowski Suburban Daredevil: Big Mouth/ Last Fan Standing

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Brothel

programme.title: Modern Family: Grill, Interrupted
programme.desc: Jay's birthday brings everyone together and Phil is beside himself over the super cool gift he got Jay, a high-tech outdoor grill. Claire and Mitch decide they will 'offer' to pay back the money Jay loaned them ages ago.

programme.desc: Detectives Stabler and Fin investigate when two high school children disappear from a museum while on a class field trip.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Trials
programme.desc: After a young boy is caught driving a runaway van, detectives learn that the seven-year-old's foster parents offer him bribes in exchange for abusive medical testing. The case leads Olivia to re-examine a cold case involving a rape victim.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Baggage
programme.desc: The brutal murder of an artist leads detectives to a long string of murders by a serial killer that Detective Victor Moran has been following for months. Moran fights to keep control of the case while Fin and Stabler struggle to find the killer.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Anchor

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: P.C.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Confidential
programme.desc: After security footage captures a woman being abducted, she is found murdered and dumped in a basement. Detective Munch recalls a similarity between this case and one from 20-years prior.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Witness
programme.desc: When a young girl is raped in her apartment building's stairwell, Detectives Benson and Stabler find her shaken at the hospital. After meeting her boyfriend, the detectives think she may have made the story up for attention, until a witness is revealed.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Disabled
programme.desc: A disabled woman is beaten and raped and her condition leaves her unable to speak. Benson and Stabler are able to conclude that someone close to her is responsible and that leads them to her sister and nephew.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Torch
programme.desc: When two sisters are killed in a fire, Benson and Stabler are called in to investigate, even though there is no evidence of a sex-crime. The detectives later learn that the case may be more suited to them than anyone had originally thought.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Ace

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Wannabe
