programme.desc: Grandma Madea is mischievous and impulsive with a few anger control issues. After a high-speed chase and appearing in front of a judge, she finds herself in jail with a variety of interesting characters.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Mad Black Woman
programme.desc: Helen McCarter has everything going for her, until her wealthy husband admits to having an affair and throws her out of the house. A distraught Helen turns to her family as she learns to stand up on her own two feet.

programme.title: Movie: About Last Night
programme.desc: Two couples immediately end up together, respectively, after meeting in a bar. They soon find their new relationships put to the test when they must take things out of the bedroom and into the real world.

programme.title: Movie: B.A.P.S
programme.desc: Two waitresses, sick of their nowhere jobs and mooching boyfriends, leave Georgia for Hollywood and a scheme to scam an aging millionaire - but complications ensue.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Movin' on Up
programme.desc: In order to impress famous businessmen, Shawn pretends to be highly successful.

programme.title: The Wayans Brothers: Gots to Have a J-o-b
programme.desc: Marlon gets a well paying job as a commercial actor, but he hates his part.

programme.title: Martin: Come on Over to My Place
programme.desc: Cole's new girlfriend Shanise forces him to move into his own apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Scrooge
programme.desc: Martin is visited by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

programme.title: Martin: Waiting, Debating and Ovulating
programme.desc: After Martin promises to spend more time with Gina, he ends up on jury duty with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1
programme.desc: Everyone goes on a cruise, except Gina who accidentally missed it. Martin meets a beautiful woman named Ellen who he thinks is depressed, and Tommy and Pam try to be friends.

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 2
programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.title: Martin: You Play Too Much
programme.desc: Martin helps a burglar rob his apartment because he thinks it's part of a prank by Pam.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't That About a Ditch
programme.desc: Gina's mother comes to visit while she is away and wants to spend time with Martin.

programme.title: Martin: I, Martin, Take Thee Pam?
programme.desc: Martin discovers that his marriage is invalid and that he's actually married to Pam.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: When You Hit Upon a Star
programme.desc: Will's love affair with a musician is threatened when she meets her handsome ex-lover.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Stop Will! In the Name of Love
programme.desc: Ashley rebels against Will's overprotectiveness when he chaperones her on a date.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: You'd Better Shop Around
programme.desc: Will withdraws from his university classes to become a successful car salesman.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Ol' Ball and Chain
programme.desc: On the day of Jazz's wedding, his bride-to-be makes sexual advances towards Will.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: The Harder They Fall
programme.desc: Will is stranded in a mountain forest with his new girlfriend's disagreeable father.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys
programme.desc: Two hip Miami undercover detectives have 72 hours to nab the crooks who stole millions in recovered heroin from the police station.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Boys II
programme.desc: Narcotics detectives Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett have been assigned to a high-tech task force that is investigating the flow of designer ecstasy into Miami. Their inquiries inadvertently lead them to a major conspiracy involving a vicious kingpin.

programme.title: Movie: One Winter Proposal
programme.desc: Old flames burn bright when a group of people meet up again for a ski weekend.

programme.title: Movie: Unleashing Mr. Darcy
programme.desc: A woman shows her dog in a fancy New York dog show and the judge comes off as rude and aristocratic. A chain of misunderstanding unfolds during the competition, complicating the attraction they have for one another.

programme.title: Movie: Two for the Win
programme.desc: A world champion ski racer and local ski instructor find romance on the slopes as he returns home and prepares for the biggest race of his life.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Iceland
programme.desc: A woman gathers her college travel group together for a trip to Iceland. Her ex is part of this group and shows up uninvited, and shows her exactly what she is missing since their breakup.

programme.title: Movie: A Royal Winter
programme.desc: A woman flies to Europe for some soul searching, and sight-seeing, with a friend. While there she encounters a handsome European playboy prince.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rites of Spring
programme.desc: The housemates decide that it is time to diet seriously.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Foreign Exchange
programme.desc: Sophia's friends arrive from Sicily, claiming that their real bambina is Dorothy.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: We're Outta Here
programme.desc: A for sale sign was accidentally placed on the front lawn. But, Blanche begins to consider actually selling after seeing how much she's offered.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: We're Outta Here
programme.desc: Blanche debates on whether or not to sell the house as she and the rest of the girls recall times they have spent together.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy is suffering from a mysterious fatigue syndrome that her doctors cannot identify.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sick and Tired
programme.desc: Dorothy finds a specialist, a Chinese virologist, who may have the key to her illness.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Accurate Conception
programme.desc: Blanche's daughter, Rebecca, has some wonderful news. She's going to become a mother through artificial insemination. However, Blanche is less than thrilled and totally against the entire idea.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Rose Fights Back
programme.desc: When the company that Rose's husband worked for, cuts off their pension plan, Rose must face the fact that she's going to get a new job, one that pays more.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Love Under the Big Top
programme.desc: Dorothy's in a serious relationship with a lawyer and jumps to the conclusion that he's on the verge of proposing. His annoucement is shocking as he's leaving law to become a circus clown. Rose and Blanch put together a protest to save some dolphins.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Dancing in the Dark
programme.desc: Rose has been dating, Miles Webber, a college professor, but the only thing they seem to have in common is the dance floor.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Not Another Monday
programme.desc: Sophia's friend has come up with an idea that will change her life. She wants to commit suicide and she wants Sophia there to hold her hand.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: That Old Feeling
programme.desc: Blanche is visited by her brother in-law and is taken back by his resemblance to her deceased husband. She quickly finds herself falling in love with hopes of marriage.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Comedy of Errors
programme.desc: Dorothy wants to fulfill her ambition to become a stand-up comic.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: All That Jazz
programme.desc: Dorothy's son shows up, jobless and wifeless, and wanting to be a free spirit.

programme.title: Movie: Love on Ice
programme.desc: A former figure skater gets an improbably shot to reclaim skating glory when a young coach sees greatness in her. They find their love of skating goes far beyond the ice.

programme.title: Movie: Birthday Wish
programme.desc: A woman expecting to get engaged on her 30th birthday gets a different surprise after she makes her wish. She has a glimpse into her future which doesn't resemble anything she's ever imagined.

programme.title: Movie: Winter Love Story
programme.desc: An author publishes her first novel, but it fails to sell well so she embarks on a book tour. While on tour, she meets a handsome fantasy-author that helps boost her sales, and a romance quickly follows.

programme.title: Movie: Love on the Slopes
programme.desc: A copy-editor is sent to a resort to write a story for a competition. While there, she tries out skiing and finds herself falling for an extreme-sports competitor.

programme.title: The Office: The Banker
programme.desc: When a potential buyer comes to Dunder Mifflin, Michael, Dwight, Andy and Pam pull out all the stops in the hopes of impressing him with their high profile contacts. Michael reminisces about all the great times they have had in the office.

programme.title: The Office: Sabre
programme.desc: When Sabre comes in to take over Dunder Mifflin, Michael struggles to accept the new policies. Pam and Jim have an interview at the daycare they are hoping to get accepted into.

programme.title: Movie: Get Him to the Greek
programme.desc: A record company hires an intern to accompany an out-of-control rock star to Los Angeles for a concert. The intern struggles to navigate the musician through wild parties and strip clubs in London, New York and Las Vegas.

programme.title: Movie: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: After a musician is dumped by his actress girlfriend, he travels to Hawaii to heal. When he arrives in Hawaii, he discovers that his ex and her new boyfriend are staying at the same resort.

programme.title: Movie: Hot Tub Time Machine
programme.desc: Four adult friends in the midst of mid-life crises return to the '80s through a hot tub that's also a time machine. They arrive at a resort and decide they have a chance to change their destinies so they can be happier in their future lives.

programme.title: South Park: Rainforest Shmainforest
programme.desc: The boys travel to the Costa Rican rainforest as a part of the 'Getting Gay with Kids' choir tour.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: South Park: Kenny Dies
programme.desc: When Kenny contracts a deadly disease, Cartman refuses to let his friend die. He speaks before Congress in favour of stem-cell research that could potentially save Kenny's life.

programme.title: South Park: Cow Days
programme.desc: South Park's 14th Annual Cow Days rodeo and carnival is here and the boys are determined to win Terrance and Phillip dolls. Meanwhile, someone has stolen the Cow Memorial statue, and newcomers Tom and Mary are blamed for the theft.

programme.title: South Park: Cartmanland
programme.desc: Cartman inherits a million dollars from his grandmother and fulfills his lifelong dream of owning his own amusement park: Cartmanland. Meanwhile, Kyle is aghast at Cartman getting his dreams, and renounces his faith.

programme.title: South Park: Prehistoric Ice Man
programme.desc: Kyle and Stan's friendship is strained after they discover a man frozen in an ice cave and have differing opinions about what is best for their 'discovery.'

programme.title: South Park: Sexual Harassment Panda
programme.desc: After Sexual Harassment Panda 'educates' the children, Cartman sues Stan for sexual harassment, and a flurry of other lawsuits follow.

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover
programme.desc: During a crime spree, Barbrady is forced to admit he can't read and must return to school. Anarchy ensues when the town realizes they are without law enforcement, so Barbrady makes the boys deputies to help keep the peace.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Grandma Got Run Over By a Reindeer
programme.desc: A young boy needs a heart transplant but doesn't seem to want it to cause philosophical differences between Burke and Yang. The interns rally to help Alex prepare for his exam; Meredith reminds Izzie of the true spirit of Christmas; Derek is not festive.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Begin the Begin
programme.desc: Izzie seems to be getting over Alex when she shares undeniable chemistry with Denny Duquette, a patient who's awaiting a heart transplant, and George treats Bex, a young teen hermaphrodite.

programme.title: The Closer: Critical Missing
programme.desc: A woman and her young daughter bob up, tied together from the bottom of the harbour. The team has to reverse their usual methods of solving crimes and work their way backwards in this strange mystery.

programme.title: The Closer: Heroic Measures
programme.desc: A woman's son dies during surgery and Deputy Police Chief Brenda Johnson is called in.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Frozen Assets
programme.desc: The division works to solve the murder of a dog that was left a $20-million estate by his deceased owner. With the help of a wannabe detective, the case takes a new turn as the squad suspect foul play in the death of the dog's owner, a wealthy heiress.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Letting It Go
programme.desc: The violent murder of an alleged rapist gives the squad the emotional task of questioning possible suspects. Meanwhile, Rusty begins to question his mother's motives as he catches her in a lie.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Do Not Disturb
programme.desc: A foreigner is found murdered inside his hotel room. The squad must work quickly to find the killer while avoiding any international repercussions when a U.S. diplomat becomes involved in the case.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles: Cops vs. Zombies
programme.desc: The team works on behalf of the dead, and the undead, after a murder occurs at a zombie convention. Angela decides to pursue her GED after revealing that she never graduated from high school.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Holy Terror
programme.desc: When churches are bombed in a community in Illinois, the people responsible are quickly apprehended. But the bombings somehow continue, leading to this explosive investigation to be reopened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Needle in a Haystack
programme.desc: There was no apparent reason for the young, healthy college student to be dead. But when the medical examiner found the tiniest of clues during the autopsy, investigators were able to unravel the mystery of betrayal and revenge.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Small Town Terror
programme.desc: Three bombings within a two-mile area were more than a coincidence, but no one claimed responsibility and no one in particular was targeted.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Cashed Out
programme.desc: When a mother of six is viciously slain in her Sarasota home, police wonder if her wealthy ex-husband might have been involved in the crime?

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Murder in the Mansion

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Death of the Socialite
programme.desc: When an Atlanta socialite is gunned down in her foyer, the search for her murderer leads investigators across the world.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Millionaires: Wealthy Widow

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 1)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Kidnapping of Elizabeth Smart (Part 2)
programme.desc: Elizabeth Smart was kidnapped from her home, snatched from her bed at knifepoint by a man in the middle of the night. We look at the unbelievable nine month saga of the police investigation and family fight to keep hope alive.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Life and Death of Anna Nicole Smith
programme.desc: Uncovering how Anna Nicole Smith's lavish lifestyle may have contributed to her mysterious death.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: The Gianni Versace Murder
programme.desc: Celebrity designer Gianni Versace was fatally shot on the steps of his Miami Beach mansion in broad daylight. The mystery of his death is unraveled by those closest to him and his killer Andrew Cunanan.

programme.title: How It Really Happened: Siegfried & Roy: The Tiger Attack (Part 1)
programme.desc: In 2003, the wildly successful careers of master illusionists Siegfried & Roy comes to a shockingly abrupt end when one of the team’s prized tigers bites Roy Horn on the neck and drags him offstage.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: North Pole
programme.desc: Bryce Ward, mayor of North Pole, and his dad, Jeff, build a family recreation cabin deep in the woods of Alaska with the help of their life-long camping buddies.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Backyard Prey
programme.desc: As fall approaches, the Kilchers kick into high gear. A large bull moose stalks the homestead and Eivin must keep his family safe. Atz Sr. hunts bear and nearly loses a horse. Otto begins the massive cleanup from an explosive wildfire prevention project.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Homestead Heartache
programme.desc: As the Fox Cabin nears completion, Atz Sr. unites seven Kilcher siblings to finish the interior of his legacy rebuild. Jane, August and Etienne embark on the final fishing trip of the year and Eivin suffers a devastating loss.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Three Million Dollar Bet
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Homestead Heartache
programme.desc: As the Fox Cabin nears completion, Atz Sr. unites seven Kilcher siblings to finish the interior of his legacy rebuild. Jane, August and Etienne embark on the final fishing trip of the year and Eivin suffers a devastating loss.

programme.title: Undercover Billionaire: Three Million Dollar Bet
programme.desc: With just $100 in their pockets, three business titans are dropped in unfamiliar cities, stripped of their names, money, and contacts and given a simple challenge: build a $1 million business in just 90 days.

programme.title: Outback Lockdown: Risking it, and Roughing It
programme.desc: Life doesn't get any easier for Ky and Calem, as their stay in the Outback is set to last much longer than planned. They travel three hours away to the nearest town for some emergency supplies, only to face a violent dust storm upon their return.

programme.title: Outback Lockdown: The Duck Hunt
programme.desc: Once more, Ky and Calem's supplies are running short, and they urgently need food. The couple tries to hunt for ducks, which is just as frustrating as tracking the goats. Once they score their prey, they attempt to build an oven.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Freakshow on Wheels
programme.desc: An enthusiastic cowboy is looking for a rat rod to lift the spirits of his small town. Steve quickly lands on the idea of making a death-defying carnival ride on wheels.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Water Rat
programme.desc: A family man with a need for speed brings a battered 50's era pickup to Steve looking for a bad ass rat rod the whole family can enjoy. To meet their client's demands the crew need to find a way to add glitz and gloss to a smoke belching monster.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Fuel to the Fire
programme.desc: Restoring a 1930's era fuel delivery truck proves a big challenge when the crew discovers a warped frame. Steve ups the anti and insists that the resurrected tanker feature 21st century technology, hydraulic brakes, and run only on bio fuels.

programme.title: Vegas Rat Rods: Shredding Metal
programme.desc: A client comes to Steve with a pristinely restored 1954 Tin Woody Wagon hoping the Welderup crew can 'make it cool'. When Steve's plans call for burning the car to achieve the look he's after some on the team wonder if he's finally gone too far.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Trials of a T-Bird
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron bring a hot '58 Corvette home to the new Gas Monkey World Headquarters. Christie takes a gamble, buying a '65 TBird while Richard is away. Model Alloy Ash fires up her welding torch to prove to Aaron she's more than just a pretty face.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: NHRA and a '55 Pink Caddy, Part I
programme.desc: When Richard gets a deal to build a '55 Pink Caddy for a 100 grand, it all seems like a sweet deal. Until the monkeys relay that they may not be able to build the car in time for the tight deadline. Meanwhile, Richard invests in sponsoring and NHRA team.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: NHRA and a '55 Pink Caddy, Part II
programme.desc: After a constant wait for parts for the '55 Pink Caddy, the monkeys make a mad dash to get the car done on time. Meanwhile, Richard ventures into new territory as his Gas Monkey Dragster hits the Texas Motorplex for the NHRA qualifying runs.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cutlass Lowrider, Part I
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron take on a new build when they decide to transform a $300 find on the side of the road into a '76 Exploration van. The Dale Earnhardt '56 Nomad makes an appearance back at the shop, as KC and his team are tasked with fixing the body.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Cutlass Lowrider, Part II
programme.desc: As Richard heads to Houston to check out Gas Monkey's top fuel NHRA dragster do some racing, the Monkeys need to do some racing of their own to finish a custom lowrider paint job on the '78 Cutlass in time for the car's debut.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: '71 Scat Pack Challenger, Part I
programme.desc: Richard and Aaron transform a vintage '71 Dodge Scat Pack Challenger by using the power of a 2015 Scat Pack Challenger under the hood. Richard invests in a concert venue and a '57 Shorty School bus gets a makeover with hilarious results.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Cystic River
programme.desc: Dennis has several giant growths on the back of his head. Juan has a rare condition he hopes Dr. Lee will understand. Natalie searches for answers as to why her body is covered in hundreds of mysterious dark bumps.

programme.title: Unpolished: A New Beginning
programme.desc: A devastating loss hits the Martone family at its core as sisters Lexi and Bria and their mother Jennifer work together to reopen the salon after being closed due to the pandemic.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: The Real You

programme.desc: The desert country of Mojave, California, hosts a rough auction where the buyers have to dig deep to find value.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Invent a Dish Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe show off their artistic abilities as they dine, and get Mariano Rivera to judge their works. Plus, Q flips a doubloon to determine if there will be another season.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Three Men and Your Baby
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr, and Q get snap happy posing as photographers, and all but one of the guys are faced with a punishment that's not child's play.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: The guys get drenched at a water park, and tonight's loser strikes out while jockeying for a ball from Mets pitcher Noah Syndergaard.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Sal, Joe, Murr and Q take a spin in a motorized chair hoping the kindness of strangers will keep them on track. Tonight's big loser walks away bruised and battered when he's forced to clear some tables in an unusual way.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Sun-Fan Lotion
programme.desc: Murr, Q and Sal are at the massage parlor for much kneaded relaxation, and then ask strangers their opinions on questionable yearbook ads. Later, tonight's big loser has an awkward but fan-tastic time in the sun.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Urine Trouble
programme.desc: The guys play receptionists looking for suspicious names. The guys seek marriage advice from strangers after a private eye shares incriminating photos. The big loser goes from pissed off to pissed on in the matter of one punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Irritable Vowel Syndrome
programme.desc: Murr, Sal and Joe seek help from customers when escaping security at the grocery store, then tell bizarre tales to diners at a food court. Plus, the big loser is in consonant hell when he's left looking for a missing letter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Bad Carma
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q showcase questionable products to participants, and then rescue strangers who don't need to be rescued. Later, the big loser must hit and run his mouth to get himself out of trouble.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Fast Feud
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Toll Booth Corrector
programme.desc: The guys pose as suspicious nutritionists trying to recruit clients, before quitting their jobs for strange reasons. Afterwards, the gang goes head-to-head in a wild debate judged by a stranger.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Food After Da' Club Episode
programme.desc: The guys hit the virtual nightclub with DJ Marshmello and Edie Falco. Joe sends the guys some bottle service.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dinner Party: The Halloween Episode
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Sal and Joe have a Halloween-themed party and surprise each other with elaborate costumes. They're joined by Kane Hodder, aka Jason Voorhees.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Out of Left Field
programme.desc: Find out whose familiar face showed up in the waiting room, how many dogs Sal had to babysit, and which Joker came up with the punishment that left Joe feeling numb.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out questions and trivia like why Q wore a wedding ring during a challenge, which crew member slapped him way too hard, and who has a history with the punishment guest.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover what kind of vehicle the Jokers had to stay in for a challenge. Plus, find out how Murr’s TV career actually started. Finally, find out why tonight's punishment was nostalgic for the guys.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Joker for a Day
programme.desc: Find out which challenges the crew loves the most and what the original name for the TV show started off as. Also, find out how the Jokers pick their victims.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pay It Forward
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes on the very first Impractical Jokers episode and discover what social superpower the Jokers now possess. Plus, find out which audio equipment is not used anymore and the true history around Joe's 'nosing'.

programme.desc: Due to a work commitment, Julie must miss Chloe's Pre-K graduation while Todd takes over her duties. Savannah tries to prove to Todd she's ready for a new job in California.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Towing the Line
programme.desc: Chase takes advantage of his dad's car when Savannah signs them up to babysit over Father's Day. Meanwhile, Grayson has trouble getting along with Savannah's boyfriend, Nic.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple G Redemption
programme.desc: Four chefs return to Flavortown for a second chance at the $20,000 Shopping Spree. But Guy Fieri doesn't make this trip any easier, as the four chefs make a redemption dinner.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Comfort Food Cook-Off
programme.desc: Guy Fieri brings four comfort food experts to Flavortown to compete in games that will push them out of their comfort zone. First, the chefs must make their signature dish while incorporating a list of mandatory ingredients.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Ultimate Chicken Challenge
programme.desc: There's no cluckin' around when four chefs come to Flavortown to compete in three chicken-themed rounds to prove their poultry prowess.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Battle America II: Cook or Be Cooked
programme.desc: Four chefs proudly represent their regions in the return of a Triple G favorite, Battle America. Making a regional feast without meat sounds odd, but that's what happens when all the even aisles are off limits.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Delivery: DDD OGs
programme.desc: Three Diners, Drive-ins and Dives chefs with experience in Flavortown Market are playing grocery games in their own joints. Guy and Hunter Fieri send them a big box of groceries perfect for a fried feast and a classic takeout dish.

programme.title: Worst Cooks in America: Sauce Studies and Boardwalk Games
programme.desc: The recruits learn about sauces before chefs Anne Burrell and Carla Hall teach them how to make meatballs and sauce and saucy enchiladas. Former recruits settle in to watch a boardwalk-themed episode with Chef Anne and Chef Alex Guarnaschelli as mentors.

programme.title: Cakealikes: Lady Gaga
programme.desc: Cake artists take on the challenge of recreating Lady Gaga's most iconic moments in cake form. Host Tregaye Fraser and judges Kalen Allen and Natalie Sideserf are joined by entertainer Erika Smith to choose the winner.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Keeping It Real
programme.desc: Ted Allen from 'Chopped' and TV host Jeannie Mai are keeping it real with Bobby, and they want a win. They stack the deck with two authentic cuisine experts, chefs Ryan DePersio and Giuseppe Fanelli, who want Bobby begging for Mamma Mia after they win.

programme.title: Beat Bobby Flay: Judges as Contenders
programme.desc: The script is flipped and judgment is passed when Beat Bobby Flay judges Michael Psilakis and Seamus Mullen step up to take Bobby down themselves. Food Network's Marcus Samuelsson and Sunny Anderson decide which chef can push Bobby to his limit.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Price Crunch Challenge
programme.desc: The Kitchen hosts compete to make the most-affordable meal that doesn't skimp on flavour. Alex Guarnaschelli starts the competition with her meaty, cheesy stuffed peppers and Geoffrey Zakarian makes breakfast for dinner with a family-sized omelette.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Step Up the Savings
programme.desc: The Kitchen is stepping up the savings to make flavorful meals on a budget, starting with cheat sheet chorizo panzanella. There's also spaghetti with clams, slow-cooked adobo chicken and fancy-yet-frugal English pea and sweet onion risotto.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: The One About Puppies and Kitties

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Spring in the Great Outdoors: Team Challenges
programme.desc: It's team challenge week, and the eight bakers grab a buddy to spring into the outdoors. First, they bake tasty hand-held treats for a hike. Then it's time for a bike ride as each baker must make a Paris-Brest wheel.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship: Trolls World Tour

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Liars and Trespassers

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Lying Dogs

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Midnight Manhunt
programme.desc: A badly injured tortoise needs an innovative procedure and an eagle's death is investigated. Out on the lake, wardens educate the public on staying safe. As night falls, a car crash turns into a manhunt.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Stag Poaching
programme.desc: Texas Game Warden Gould responds to the call about an exotic red stag that was shot. In Hunt County, a plethora of warrants are dispersed for unpaid fishing violations, while Warden Flores and Williams join forces on the last day on patrol.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Bigger and Better: Suspicious Encounters
programme.desc: A check for a fishing license takes an unlikely turn and an abandoned car is found on private property. Wardens Sellers and Roraback are in pursuit of illicit hunters, and zebra mussels are suspected of being illegally transported in Llano County.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Garage Gator
programme.desc: In Liberty County, Game Warden Jake Noxon investigates a family for illegally keeping a pet deer, and farther south an alligator roams a garage. Game Warden Mike Boone joins forces with local police to track down armed suspects after a robbery.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Reckless Behavior
programme.desc: During deer hunting season, Wardens Gould and Scott respond to a call about finding carcasses on private property. Then, stray bullets are shot into a horse owner's home, while hunters are questioned about hunting illegally.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Anglers, Alcohol and Owls
programme.desc: In Texas, a woman is found in distress on the side of the highway. Warden Hensz handles an aggressive family of owls, while Warden Bailey responds to a call about underage drinkers holding a fishing tournament.

programme.title: Lone Star Law: Drug Run River
programme.desc: Game wardens Gould and Hickerson chase drug smugglers that crossed the Rio Grande River. Game warden Boone checks out an injured bird. Game warden Damron relocates a feisty marsupial and her babies. Amundson and Poole meet a fan.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The Last Sunset
programme.desc: The cost of life hundreds of miles from civilization is front and center. Tyler and Ashley trek 15 miles to a lake cabin to run their dog team and search for food. Bob leaves home to see his daughter and assess the damage of his crashed plane.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Into the Darkness
programme.desc: Day one of darkness has arrived in the refuge. Heimo's golden rule to never get caught miles from home in the dark is in jeopardy. The Lewis Family prepares for a life changing event as their daughters prepare to leave and head out on their own in town.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: Nothing Lasts Forever
programme.desc: As they near the end of winter, the refuge residents look toward the future. Bob trains his pup Ruger to be a hunting dog, while Ray prepares for an empty nest life without his daughters. Heimo's ambitious mind pushes his aging body to the brink.

programme.title: The Last Alaskans: The End of Darkness
programme.desc: Sunlight finally returns to the refuge. Heimo's stopped in his tracks by -50 degree temperatures. The Seldens make their home in a new cabin. Bob tries to salvage his worst season in 40 years and questions his future.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Preserving the Old Ways
programme.desc: Striving toward the Kilchers' tradition of preserving the old ways, Eivin guides August on his first-ever deer hunt. Etienne joins Atz Lee and Jane on his first big game hunt. Atz Sr. and Otto attempt to tear down and reassemble a historic barn.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Fall Scramble

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Legacies Live On

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Chasing Caribou
programme.desc: Jane heads to the Arctic Circle hoping to bag a caribou before winter. Atz Sr. and Atz Lee butcher their island cows and haul the meat back home. Meanwhile, Otto, Eivin, Charlotte and August wrap up the season's final cattle drive.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Whole New Frontier

programme.title: Exhumed: Cold Case, Unearthed
programme.desc: Marilyn McIntyre's gruesome murder goes unsolved for decades, until a phone call resurrects the investigation. Is it possible evidence is buried with the victim? After thirty years underground, does it still exist?

programme.title: Monster Preacher: Monster Preacher
programme.desc: In 1986, self-proclaimed pastor, Gary Heidnik, kidnapped, tortured and raped six women in Philadelphia, brutally murdering two. In this special, hear from two of the victims themselves as they recount the horrors of surviving the monster preacher.

programme.title: Dateline: Family Affair
programme.desc: Wealthy Ben Novack Jr. was found dead in his hotel room in Westchester N.Y. With many suspects in mind, including Novack's wife and stepdaughter, police determine if the killing was driven by greed or jealousy.

programme.title: Dateline: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. Two hours after the murder, detectives get a lead from a 911 caller and discover the student's fiancé may hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: Dateline: Internal Affairs
programme.desc: A beautiful, popular graduate student is shot dead outside her apartment in Durham, North Carolina. Two hours after the murder, detectives get a lead from a 911 caller and discover the student's fiancé may hold the key to solving the case.

programme.title: The Case Died With Her
programme.desc: Loni Coombs investigates the case of Emilie Morris, a former star high school athlete whose coach confesses on tape to an inappropriate relationship. When Emilie is found dead before an important hearing, the case dies with her over a legal loophole.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Tangled
programme.desc: At first it looked like a home invasion gone wrong, a robbery that resulted in the murder of Ralph Candelario's wife, Pam. Ralph was found at the crime scene dazed and confused but his confusing story had police questioning his version of events.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Suspicion
programme.desc: The neighbors you’re about to meet enjoyed mixing business with pleasure then a murder made them face the reality that a killer was in their midst.

programme.title: The Jane Doe Murders
programme.desc: In September 1996, a murdered woman is discovered in the Oregon woods- Polk County Jane Doe. For 24 years, she remains unidentified until former Las Vegas PD CSI, Yolanda McClary, identifies her, prompting a detective to investigate the murder.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Musclehead Murders/ Murder in the Keys
programme.desc: A wealthy Miami couple disappears leaving an abandoned Lamborghini. Police are perplexed until a rich businessman comes forward with a bizarre and torturous tale of a group of muscled men looking for a fast way to flashy cars and a fabulous lifestyle.

programme.title: Florida Man Murders: Killer Succession/ Dial 911 for Murder
programme.desc: A car bomb explodes rocking the millionaire enclave of Naples, Florida. Tobacco heiress Margaret Benson and her son are victims of a double homicide. Her severely injured daughter clings to life, and may be the police’s only hope for an eyewitness.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Princess Guide
programme.desc: Homer is put in charge of keeping Princess Kemi out of trouble while her father, a Nigerian king, works out a uranium deal with Mr. Burns. When Kemi ends up at Moe's, Moe jumps to the conclusion she's related to the prince who scammed him via e-mail.

programme.title: The Simpsons: From Russia Without Love
programme.desc: On a mission to play hardcore pranks, Bart, Nelson and Milhouse get Moe a mail-order bride on the Dark Web.

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Family Guy: The D in Apartment 23
programme.desc: When Brian posts an offensive tweet that goes viral and the rest of the Griffins are also treated as outcasts, he's forced to move out of the Griffin house.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear
programme.desc: Stewie and Brian get into a friendship-ending fight after Brian commits a terrible act to one of Stewie's beloved toys. Meanwhile, Peter refuses to wash his hand after meeting his favourite breakfast cereal mascot, Boo Berry.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Foxx in the Men House
programme.desc: Peter becomes friends with a cool, handsome paramedic named Stryker Foxx. Wrapped up in his newfound 'coolness,' he soon dumps Quagmire, Joe and Cleveland.

programme.title: Family Guy: Three Directors
programme.desc: In a special anthology-style episode, Peter gets fired from his job at the brewery in the signature styles of three famous Hollywood film directors.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XVII
programme.desc: A meteor falls to Earth and reveals a green goo that Homer mistakes for marshmallow. Bart brings Golem to life and forces him to carry out his bidding. A radio broadcast convinces the people of Springfield that they're in the midst of an alien invasion.

programme.title: The Simpsons: G.I. D'oh
programme.desc: After Bart gets out of a commitment to join the army at 18, Homer falls prey to a couple of army recruiters and lands himself in basic training. Homer, of course, treats it like summer camp and infuriates his hard-nosed colonel.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Three Girls and a Little Wharfy
programme.desc: Louise skeptically joins Jessica and fifth grader Megan in their search for Wharfy, a mythical sea monster, while Bob takes an online master class by a world-renowned chef.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Wag the Song
programme.desc: Tina competes against Gene and Louise to write a new school song for Wagstaff, but finds herself creatively stalled. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda battle blinding glare from Jimmy Pesto's new shiny steel awning across the street.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Have Yourself a Maily Linda Christmas
programme.desc: Linda works a temp job at the post office to make extra money for the holidays. But when an important package goes undelivered, Linda breaks protocol and takes it upon herself to save the day.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: A Fish Called Tina
programme.desc: Tina goes too far trying to be a perfect mentor. Meanwhile, Bob and Linda test out the gym next door.

programme.title: Archer: The Rock
programme.desc: After ISIS loses yet another lucrative contract to rival agency ODIN, Malory assigns Archer and Lana to embarrass ODIN by stealing a priceless diamond from their biggest client.

programme.title: Archer: Job Offer
programme.desc: When Archer takes a higher-paying job at rival agency ODIN, Malory will stop at nothing to get him back.

programme.title: Archer: Dial M for Mother
programme.desc: Questions about the identity of Archer's real father lead him into a perilous trap - and an explosive confrontation with Malory.

programme.title: Archer: Swiss Miss
programme.desc: In yet another attempt to secure funding for ISIS, Malory drags her agents to the luxury winter resort town of Gstaad to protect a Swiss billionaire's daughter from a kidnapping threat. Archer soon learns the real threat is his protectee.

programme.title: Mom: Corned Beef and Handcuffs
programme.desc: Christy gets stuck in the middle when Bonnie and Chef Rudy start dating.

programme.title: Black-ish: Pilot
programme.desc: Dre, an advertising exec, is happily anticipating a promotion at work, which would make him the firm's first African American senior vice president. Rainbow, an anesthesiologist, is looking forward to Dre's raise.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Elephant in the Room
programme.desc: Liberals Dre and Bow go ballistic when Junior declares he's joined the Young Republican Club to impress a girl (ironically named Hillary). Meanwhile, everyone teases Zoey when she finds out she needs glasses.

programme.title: Black-ish: THE Word
programme.desc: Jack performs the song 'Gold Digger' at a school talent show and when he sings a lyric that includes THE word, it leads to his possible expulsion from school.

programme.title: Black-ish: Hope
programme.desc: When the kids ask some tough questions in the midst of a highly publicized court case involving alleged police brutality and an African-American teenager, Dre and Bow are conflicted on how best to field them.

programme.title: Black-ish: 40 Acres and a Vote
programme.desc: With Obama leaving office and the upcoming election, Dre finds a new candidate to believe in: Junior. Junior is running for class president and is overqualified for the job, but he just can't seem to connect with his fellow classmates.

programme.title: Black-ish: Who's Afraid of the Big Black Man
programme.desc: After a situation arises at work, Dre's views are confronted regarding how black people are perceived now versus when he grew up. He wants to be more open-minded about being a part of his community, so he joins the Homeowners' Association.

programme.title: Black-ish: The Name Game
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have a gender reveal party, and Dre is thrilled because it's his turn to name the baby. He decides on a culturally significant name that Bow and Ruby aren't a fan of.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: Juneteenth
programme.desc: The Johnsons go to Jack and Diane's school play about Columbus Day, and Dre is dismayed by the historically inaccurate way that the holiday is portrayed.

programme.title: Black-ish: North Star
programme.desc: When both Dre and Bow's families show up for Easter, they have to learn to love each other's different cuisines. Meanwhile, Junior tries to organize an Easter egg hunt but Jack and Diane pretend not to be interested to impress their cooler cousins.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Math
programme.desc: When Junior is accepted to Howard and Stanford, Dre tries to convince him to attend his alma mater. Meanwhile, Jack develops a comedy style and Ruby decides she's going to manage his career, forcing Diane to compete for her attention.

programme.title: Black-ish: Don't You Be My Neighbor
programme.desc: The neighbours decide to rent their house out for homestays and it’s causing problems for the Johnsons. Dre develops a newfound joy of calling the cops over petty neighbourhood issues but begins to question the example he is setting for Jack.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Like Us
programme.desc: Dre and Bow are furious after Diane isn't lit properly in her class photo. Diane doesn't want to make it a big deal, but they decide to talk to the principal about the need for sensitivity toward all complexions.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dreamgirls and Boys
programme.desc: Dre and Bow struggle with the changing times of identity politics and gender neutrality. Diane auditions for the school play and scores the male lead part, but her crush starts spending time with another girl.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black History Month
programme.desc: Dre is upset after he learns that Jack and Diane are getting the same surface-level education about Black History Month that he got when he was growing up.

programme.title: Black-ish: Each One, Teach One
programme.desc: Dre feels like he has made a difference with the diversity at Stevens & Lido as the head of the Urban Division, but when Junior tells him that Josh is his mentor, Dre flips out.

programme.desc: Carcer is willing to do anything to find Gawain the sword. The Watch is close on his tail, following him to Twilight Canyons, a place where the elderly residents await DEATH, and DEATH patiently waits for them to draw their last breaths.

programme.desc: At an infamous prison in the Amazon, the most dangerous criminals on earth faced hard labour, a hostile environment and death by guillotine. Today, it's deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this hellish compound was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Sea Fortress of Doom
programme.desc: A terrifying sea fortress, a highway in the Amazon that suddenly vanishes, and a mysterious structure in the shadow of the Statue of Liberty are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death

programme.title: Unearthed: Sumerian Pyramid of Death
programme.desc: Deep in the Iraqi desert, the world's only ziggurat towers over the remains of the first civilization ever known in human history; armed with pioneering satellite imagery, experts investigate the dark mysteries behind this massive, ancient structure.

programme.title: Secrets Of The Viking Stone: Viking Confidential
programme.desc: Hollywood actor Peter Stormare and Elroy Balgaard need to find more artifacts to support their case, so they arrange to meet a mysterious man with knowledge of the runestone at a secret location where he has something important to show them.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Thing on Hell Mountain
programme.desc: A massive, alien-like fortress built into a mountainside is the central node to a network of pipelines that race outwards like tentacles; behind-the-scenes access reveals the secrets of why this strange complex was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Factory of Death
programme.desc: A deserted facility in the remote countryside features mysterious graffiti that may be highly advanced mathematical equations pointing to a dark secret; experts investigate this classified military wasteland with a deadly past.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Chasing Bigfoot
programme.desc: An eerie creature is recorded stalking Georgia's ancient forest, and some believe it's Bigfoot. Terrifying explosions rock the streets of Manhattan. Cameras record a mysterious object diving into a deadly volcano, leaving experts stumped.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Jungle Werewolf
programme.desc: A strange beast is spotted in a remote Brazilian town. A cataclysmic blast sparks fears of nuclear disaster. When a child displays superhuman powers, some fear it's the devil's work.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Doomsday Swamp
programme.desc: A high-speed police chase ends when the fugitive makes an impossible getaway. Deep in Louisiana, a swamp devours 100-foot trees, and experts worry that a nearby town could be next. Three cars are recorded mysteriously levitating at a busy intersection.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Attack of the Fire Devil
programme.desc: A man is recorded surviving two lightning strikes in moments. Cameras spot strange lights in the sky in Norway, turning a remote area into a UFO hot spot. A bizarre glowing object is caught on tape at a museum, and some wonder if it's an alien artifact.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Monster of the Deep
programme.desc: Strange footage captures a mystifying monster from the deep, baffling marine biologists. Bizarre ghost lights haunt North Carolina mountains for centuries. When a giant explosion is caught on tape in New Mexico, investigators fear the US is under attack.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Return of the Ice Monster
programme.desc: A giant creature in an armor of ice is spotted in the Alaskan wild, and some suspect it's a deadly mythical monster. A jet has a close encounter with an unknown object. Evidence of a deadly lightning strike invites paranormal explanations.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Midnight Train to Hell
programme.desc: A sinister locomotive breathes fire into the night sky, and locals fear it's a demonic train coming to claim their souls. When something terrifying emerges from a mysterious lake in Ireland, experts wonder if it could be a modern-day leviathan.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: The Beast That Ate Jaws
programme.desc: When a shark is eaten by a mysterious predator, experts wonder if a prehistoric monster is to blame. A sinister sight is caught on tape near Russia's Area 51, and the evidence might point to a cover-up.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Aliens of Hell Highway
programme.desc: When cameras capture footage of a highway swarmed with snake-like creatures and an unexplained ooze, experts investigate the origins of these alien creatures; the latest tech reveals where they came from and their top-secret purpose.

programme.title: Strange Evidence: Doomsday Vegas UFO
programme.desc: After cameras capture footage of a UFO over Las Vegas, officials claim it's just a meteor, but some suspect something far stranger. Using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate if it's evidence of an alien visit or a top-secret military project.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Island of Arctic Cannibals
programme.desc: Three graves are discovered on the frozen beach of an uninhabited Arctic island, and the mummified corpses inside may answer a centuries-old mystery of an expedition that was literally consumed by the cannibalistic insanity of its mutinous crew.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Mystery of Skeleton Lake
programme.desc: A frozen lake deep in the Himalayas melts once a year to expose hundreds of human bones and a centuries-old mystery of astonishing carnage, leaving experts to speculate if it was a single catastrophic event or something much more sinister.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Shallow Grave
programme.desc: Christmas will never be the same for the two local residents of Noble, Oklahoma whose dog drops a human skull onto their front porch. After six years and no leads, the police must navigate the twists and turns of the victim's past to find redemption.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Ashes to Alibis
programme.desc: Residents of Post Falls, Idaho, are shocked when devoted family man Bo Kirk vanishes, and his truck is found set ablaze. Bo's sister blames their estranged father, until released ATM security footage suggests a co-worker with piercing blue eyes.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: If the Walls Could Talk
programme.desc: A quiet affluent retirement community in Monroe, Ohio is baffled when Barbara Howe simply vanishes one night. The police soon find her body in the trunk of her car, her throat slit. The hunt for her killer takes them back to an unlikely source.

programme.title: Murder in the Heartland: Love on the Rocks
programme.desc: In Montrose, Colorado, rock quarry owner and mother, Irene Trujillo, suddenly goes missing. When her daughter's search for their mom comes up empty, 911 is called. Those closest to Irene, including her employees, are suspected of foul play.

programme.title: American Monster: Brothers in Arms
programme.desc: Mark Corona and Paul Stoeppler are two cousins who are as close as brothers. This blood bond is destroyed when one of them is murdered in cold blood. Never-before-seen home video and shocking CCTV footage reveal what really happened.

programme.title: American Monster: Unmasked
programme.desc: Rob and Lisa Whedbee are a beautiful couple who turn heads wherever they go. But when a medical trauma upends their happy family, it sets them on a path of destruction that will end in lies, accusations, and a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Brand New Dress
programme.desc: An argument among sisters over a new dress leads a young girl to leave her house to calm down. But when she never returns, the desperate search to find her begins.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: The Hero Who Wasn't
programme.desc: When a couple enters their home during a robbery in progress, a deadly shoot out erupts, leaving two people dead. But when police begin an investigation they discover clues that it may not have been what it appears to be.

programme.title: American Monster: Unmasked
programme.desc: Rob and Lisa Whedbee are a beautiful couple who turn heads wherever they go. But when a medical trauma upends their happy family, it sets them on a path of destruction that will end in lies, accusations, and a brutal home invasion.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: A Brand New Dress
programme.desc: An argument among sisters over a new dress leads a young girl to leave her house to calm down. But when she never returns, the desperate search to find her begins.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Taken from Her Bed
programme.desc: An 8-year-old girl disappears from her bedroom in the middle of the night.

programme.title: American Monster: Don't Forget Me
programme.desc: On the day before he's to start a new job, a father-of-two disappears with no warning. His wife has no idea where he went. His friends hint that he led a secret, sordid life. But it remains a mystery for years - until a tip reveals the jaw-dropping truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: My Secret Nightmare
programme.desc: Tiffany Shore grew up knowing that her father was evil, but she still kept his secrets. When Tiffany finally escapes him, she is devastated to discover that has committed far more heinous acts than she ever imagined or knew about.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Cheating Death
programme.desc: Cathy thought she had found the man of her dreams in Peter Tobin. But by the time she discovered his dark secret, it was too late. How would she keep herself and her son alive long enough to escape one of the most evil men in modern history?

programme.title: Shattered: No Good Deed
programme.desc: In 2009, one woman's long and painful struggle to overcome addiction and help others ends in a way no one ever saw coming.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: Lies or Alibis
programme.desc: Scott Davis' past caught up to him when he found himself on trial for murdering his estranged wife's new boyfriend 10 years earlier. Now his family has called in Chris Anderson and Fatima Silva to investigate what they believe is a miscarriage of justice.

programme.title: Deadly Recall: Side Business
programme.desc: When the body of a professor and family man is discovered in the office of a used car dealership, Detective Postiglione solves the puzzle after recalling a specific clue that gave the killer he spots, the window of opportunity.

programme.title: True Conviction: A Match to Murder
programme.desc: A beloved mother and daughter are senselessly murdered in their rural Florida cottage and their case goes unsolved for years. Then, out of the blue, a mysterious phone call from nearly 1500 miles away leads investigators straight to the killer.

programme.title: Still a Mystery: Her Last Night Out
programme.desc: They head out into the night, full of youthful life and promise, but they never come back. Now, clues from behind bars may help solve the mysteries that surround the disturbing disappearances of two women.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Blast from the Past
programme.desc: 38-year-old Michele Reiter's life seems to be on the up after a chaotic marriage and a troubled romance. But when Michele goes missing after accepting a date from a new Facebook friend, a horrific story unfolds.

programme.title: Deadly Women: DIY Burial
programme.desc: Dig into the world of these Deadly Women... and in their 'DIY Burial,' you will find blood and bone.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Lust to Dust
programme.desc: After her husband dies suddenly, a woman becomes the relentless target of her overly flirtatious neighbor. When her brother moves in to protect her, he's put on a collision course with the neighbor that will only be resolved with bloodshed.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Mystery in the Swamp
programme.desc: The morning of his anniversary, Mike Williams goes duck hunting. When he fails to return home that afternoon, an all-out search commences. But it's only the beginning of a sordid mystery that will take close to 20 years to solve.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Black Widow
programme.desc: Gary Taylor knows what people say about Catherine Mehaffey. Still, when he finally meets the sexy lawyer, he just can't stay away. But it's only a matter of time before Gary realizes he's made a grave mistake and breaking things off won't come easy.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Road to Burma
programme.desc: The Empire of Japan begins to conquer South East Asia. The Allies attempt to block the empire's aggressive expansion, but ruthless tactics by Japan only help to further their war effort.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Desert War
programme.desc: The war that's encompassed the globe takes root in Africa. An ambitious Mussolini expands the war into North Africa; he sends ill-prepared soldiers, and forces Hitler to come to his ally's aid.

programme.title: WWII's Greatest Raids: Commando Do or Die
programme.desc: British commandos attempt a head-on amphibious assault against a heavily-defended enemy port. Their mission is to take out the dock facilities of St. Nazaire before they become a base for Germany's biggest battleship.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Final Victory
programme.desc: The provoking thoughts behind some of the war's most tragic events are shared as the war in the Pacific nears its violent end.

programme.title: Air Aces: Robin Olds
programme.desc: In July 1966, North Vietnam's fleet of MiG-21s is hammering the US Air Force. With the help of his pilots, Colonel Robin Olds masterminds Operation BOLO.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Those Damned Engineers
programme.desc: In December of 1944, the seemingly defeated Germans secretly mustered 600,000 battle-hardened troops, including whole SS Panzer Divisions, into an all out offensive to capture Antwerp, the heart of the Allied supply chain.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Secret Vaults and Final Journeys
programme.desc: We open the nation's most secret vaults to separate fiction from fact, including taking a trip along the sea of truth to expose the myths surrounding the Titanic's final voyage.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Patriots and Presidents
programme.desc: Learn the truth behind some of America's most powerful men and the birth of the country they governed.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The Inventors
programme.desc: We don't always know the truth behind the inventors that create the devices we use every day. On America's Facts vs. Fictions, learn that Thomas Edison didn't actually invent the light bulb and Benjamin Franklin never "discovered" electricity.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: America Celebrates
programme.desc: The spotlight is on amusement parks and world fairs to separate fiction from truth. Also, explore the myths of two of our favorite holidays, Christmas and New Year's Eve.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: All-American Landmarks
programme.desc: On this special edition of America: Facts vs. Fiction, discover the real truth behind some of America's greatest landmarks.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: The New World
programme.desc: There is more to the explorers who discovered America than we have been told. Learn that Christopher Columbus never stepped foot in North America and Hernán Cortés didn't defeat the Aztecs by himself.

programme.title: America: Facts vs. Fiction: Flying Machines
programme.desc: Man created flying devices in order to travel the world and fly into space. Learn about Apollo 11 and how it came home with the help of a pen and about Air Force One, which is not a machine, but a code name.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Bull Run
programme.desc: In what will be the first real battle of the Civil War, untested and poorly trained Rebel and Confederate troops clash on the blood soaked banks of the Bull Run River.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Antietam
programme.desc: Following a string of victories in Virginia, Confederate military genius General Robert E. Lee brings his army north in a bold attempt to end the Civil War and win Southern Independence.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Fredericksburg
programme.desc: Following the strategic Union win at Antietam, federal forces clash with a massive Rebel army in the town of Fredericksburg, Virginia in what will become the largest fight of the Civil War.

programme.desc: Chase and his team are called in to renovate two A-Frames in Sugarloaf Valley. With only six weeks to accomplish both renovations, Chase splits the team down the middle. A friendly wager allows the winning team to dress the losing team up at dinner.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Desert Pond Hideaway
programme.desc: Chase and the team travel to a secluded piece of land close to Desert Pond to help a couple turn their forgotten shack into a relaxing retreat. The couple have big ambitions leaving the crew stretching a $30,000 budget in only four weeks.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family Fishing Cabin
programme.desc: The crew work to save an old cabin in Oakland, Maine, that Eric purchased from his father. He hopes the renovation will give the cabin many more years of life so he can shire his childhood memories there with his own children.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Inspirations Brewing
programme.desc: When Chase and his brother-in-law learn that the owner of their latest cabin project works at Allagash Brewing Company, they're excited to check out the brewery for inspiration as they turn the weekend getaway into a three-season home away from home.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Dream House
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley stumble upon a pre-1900s Victorian after some curbside dumpster diving. They hit New Orleans for some perfect vintage decor then return to combine two rooms into one spacious kitchen and make this the dream house worth of the name.

programme.title: Restoring Galveston: Duplex Conversion
programme.desc: Michael and Ashley learn that a coveted property is for sale while crabbing off the Galveston coast.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Rain Gear Is Going On
programme.desc: Chappie's team struggles to lift 600-pound rafters onto the cabin's roof. Then, Chris works on drying in his cabin while Jeff begins installing his cabin's windows.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Game Changer
programme.desc: Jeff struggles with his front deck. Chappie's team finds a major error while building the exterior insulation and Chris Sewell runs out of building materials.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A Toy Set For Big Kids
programme.desc: Chris gets some much needed help from family to work on his interior. A floatplane with engine problems brings Chappie's build site to a standstill and Jeff makes a critical error while building the water tank system for his cabin.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Knock This Thing Out
programme.desc: As winter barrels down on Alaska, the builders scramble to complete their heating systems. Chappie must climb an extremely tall ladder to cut a hole in his roof while Jeff and his friend Andy build a hearth and Chris fixes a leak in his chimney.

programme.title: Building Alaska: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: As the final days of their builds approach, the builders work to complete their cabins. Jeff Erickson helicopters in the remaining furniture for his cabin, and Chris Sewell's team works hard through the night to get the interior floors installed.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Big-Time Brother Rebuild in Rhode Island
programme.desc: Business partner brothers look for a vacation home in Coventry, RI. Their real estate agent finds the perfect lakefront fixer-upper, but the to-do list is long and the brothers quickly run into many structural issues.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: From LA to Lake Tuscaloosa
programme.desc: A couple hopes to escape their busy LA lives with a quiet vacation home along Lake Tuscaloosa. They find a property with great potential and are ready to take on the renovations, but it may prove to be more work than expected.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Alabama Lakefront Overhaul
programme.desc: A couple with renovation know-how is looking for a fixer-upper lake house near Weiss Lake in Alabama.

programme.title: Lakefront Bargain Hunt: Renovation: Making Memories on Lake Martin
programme.desc: A blended family of eight finds a vacation home on Lake Martin, Alabama, but the property needs major renovations. He's a contractor and is ready to get to work with a tight budget and a long to-do list to help the family realize their lakeside dreams.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Fe, New Mexico
programme.desc: Casey Webb's search for the biggest and best in Santa Fe, New Mexico, starts with a sopapilla stuffed with carne asada. Then he takes on some game-changing ice cream flavored with the local delicacy, green chiles.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Tucson
programme.desc: Adam goes to Tucson for a hot dog wrapped in bacon and covered in all the fixins.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Manchester, New Hampshire
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty travels bring him to Manchester, New Hampshire, for an epic portion of barbecue that's served on a shovel at KC's Rib Shack. At local favourite Mr. Mac's Mac and Cheese, he only has eyes for their magnum opus.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Alaska
programme.desc: Casey's nationwide feast brings him to Alaska, where he cracks into crab legs fit for a king at Slippery Salmon Bar and Grill in Anchorage. In Talkeetna, he samples the local wild game, ordering a slab of reindeer meatloaf at Denali BrewPub.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Santa Barbara, California
programme.desc: Casey Webb's tasty trek takes him to Santa Barbara, California, where he first feasts on a 2-pound portion of steamed local crab. Then he meets up with a tri-tip steak sandwich served with homemade barbecue sauce and apple horseradish.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Pretzel-a, Queen of Dessert
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Crystal River, Florida, for the Florida Manatee Festival, where he tries the OMG Pretzel Bomb and the Fried King Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Gordita, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the jackpot with midway eats, like the onion ring nacho supreme and cosmic funnel cake, at the Pasco County Fair in Florida. Later, he decks the halls and grabs a bite or two at the sights and sounds of Christmas in San Marcos, Texas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Rowdy with a Chance of Meatballs
programme.desc: Noah Cappe hits the Arkansas State Fair in Little Rock to discover a few brand-new favourites. In addition to the eponymous Arkanstick and rolled ice-cream treat known as the Rainbow Roll there are also deep-fried Pina Coladas.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: There's Something About Cherry
programme.desc: Noah Cappe arrives in Macon, Georgia, for the International Cherry Blossom Festival and some of the prettiest, pinkest carnival treats around.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seoul Dip Sisters
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets festive at the California Mid-Winter Fair and Fiesta! He's sampling the Seoul Dip- a Korean twist on the French Dip- then keeps things spicy with the Diablo Dog before going for a sweet finish with the Supreme Samoa doughnut stack.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: A Whole Beast of Flavor
programme.desc: Damaris Phillips and NASCAR personality Rutledge Wood sop up the sauce in Charleston, S.C., as they discover the pleasures of whole hog barbecue with legendary pitmaster, Rodney Scott. Then they are on to one of the best burgers in America.

programme.title: Southern and Hungry: Southern Fried Georgia
programme.desc: In Atlanta, Georgia, the Southern staples shine. We find unbelievable breakfast at a gas station, with legendary sausages and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Sizzling South Beach Brunch

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Mexican Brunch
programme.desc: One of bobby's favourite destinations gives him the inspiration for this colorful Mexican meal. Recipes include Mexican corn pancakes and crispy breakfast potatoes with red chile lime hollandaise.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Southern Comfort Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby derives inspiration from the sweet and savoury ingredients of Southern style.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Farmer's Market Brunch
programme.desc: Bobby takes his favorite green market finds to make a healthy weekend brunch. His menu features tomato strata, zucchini pancakes with apricot butter, and seared salmon with a crunchy Brussels sprouts-apple salad.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Wild Smoke and Fiery Burgers
programme.desc: In Palm Springs, Calif., Michael Symon finds a spicy burger that ignites a four-alarm fire, and a chorizo-pineapple burger sings a perfect harmony of sweet and heat.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: A Day of Comfort Food
programme.desc: Comfort food enthusiast Eddie Jackson runs down a day full of the best comfort food in the world, starting with an indulgent brioche French toast breakfast and an over-the-top sweet and savory brunch. He then grabs hot dogs and hamburgers for lunch.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Frankenfoods
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes through a full day of mind-blowing food combinations, from new takes on old favorites to presentations that aren't quite what they appear to be. These pairings keep diners guessing and leave their taste buds begging for more.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Superstuffed
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson shares a day's worth of foods that are jam-packed, crammed full and super stuffed with the tastiest, most delicious flavors imaginable.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Smothered to the Max

programme.title: Movie: Mickey's Adventures in Wonderland
