programme.title: Mom: Hot Soup and Shingles
programme.desc: When Christy gets injured, she refuses to admit she needs Bonnie's help. Meanwhile, Luke turns to Baxter for advice about being a father.

programme.title: Mom: Leather Cribs and a Medieval Rack
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie come clean about secrets they've been keeping from each other. Meanwhile, Violet and Luke discover they have different ideas about parenting.

programme.title: Mom: Fireballs and Bullet Holes
programme.desc: Christy tries to start a relationship with her father, while Bonnie struggles to accept that Christy wants him in her life.

programme.title: Mom: Nietzsche and a Beer Run
programme.desc: Christy is tempted by her old vices when she dates an attractive, hard-partying man. Meanwhile, Bonnie decides her advice is worth money and becomes a life coach.

programme.title: Mom: Jail Jail and Japanese Porn
programme.desc: When Christy puts her new relationship ahead of friends and family, Bonnie has to pick up the slack.

programme.title: Black-ish: Any Given Saturday
programme.desc: Jack and Diane are doing biography projects about each other in school, and Diane decides to shoot a documentary on Jack's budding basketball career.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Nanny
programme.desc: Dre and Bow start to slip on the kids' activities and chores around the house, so Bow persuades Dre to hire a nanny. After several interviews that don't go well, they meet Vivian, who impresses them with her desire to take care of the whole family.

programme.title: Movie: Downsizing
programme.desc: After a company develops a way to shrink people to a fraction of their normal size as a means of combating overpopulation, a husband and wife decide to go through with the procedure, but discover that the little life isn't everything that was promised.

programme.title: Movie: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
programme.desc: A pregnant Sophie grows closer to her mother as she shares stories of how she came to live on a Greek island and how she met three handsome young men, any of whom could be Sophie's father, but an unexpected visit from Sophie's grandmother changes things.

programme.title: The Blue Planet: Open Ocean
programme.desc: Examines the predatory skills of some of the most charismatic hunters found on the planet: whales, dolphins, tuna, shark and rapier-nosed billfish.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities
programme.desc: Rooted on the slope of a rocky hill in Namaqualand, South Africa stands The Namaqua Rock Fig Tree. with the ability to withstand the unforgiving conditions of the surrounding desolate landscape, and with minimal rainfall, it is a testament to survival.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Islands
programme.desc: For some, remote islands offer sanctuary away from the mainland: the tiny pygmy three-toed sloth only survives because of the peace and safety offered by its Caribbean island home, while seabirds like albatross thrive in predator-free isolation.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Mountains
programme.desc: In this episode we climb high into the world's great mountain ranges. Only a few pioneering animals have what it takes to survive up here, they are amongst the most elusive and mysterious on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Jungles
programme.desc: Jungles are the richest places on Earth. A magical world of surprise, drama and unforgettable wild characters. From the jungles of Brazil to Costa Rica, watch as the animals face life in the most competitive place on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Deserts
programme.desc: In this episode we visit the world's deserts, a land of extremes that pushes life to the limit. Animals here have developed ingenious ways of dealing with the hostile conditions giving rise to the most incredible survival stories on Earth.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Grasslands
programme.desc: Grasslands cover one quarter of all land and support the greatest gatherings of wildlife on Earth. The extraordinary creatures that live here must survive the most hostile seasons on the planet.

programme.title: Planet Earth II: Cities

programme.title: Attenborough and the Giant Elephant

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: One Way or the Otter
programme.desc: Baby fever takes over ZooTampa as the penguin keepers are on egg watch.

programme.title: Secrets of the Zoo: Tampa: Hungry, Hungry Dragons
programme.desc: Walter, a Florida panther, is getting a thorough exam after getting caught in a snare.

programme.title: Africa's Deadliest: Killer Tactics
programme.desc: Learn the techniques used by Africa's deadliest predators.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Curse of the Ice Princess
programme.desc: After a 2,500-year-old mummy is discovered in Siberia, locals report strange, cataclysmic events that point to an ancient curse; using cutting-edge archaeology, experts reveal who this person was and if they've unleashed something sinister.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Revenge of the Zombie Killer
programme.desc: Experts make a chilling new discovery when they unearth a 30,000-year-old zombie virus from an icy grave. If this ancient disease is successfully resuscitated back to life, it could cause a catastrophic global calamity.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Alien Ice Towers
programme.desc: When strange towers of ice are found growing from in a barren, water-starved desert, experts speculate why these structures have uncanny similarities to extraterrestrial formations recently discovered on Pluto's alien landscape.

programme.title: Secrets in the Ice: Arctic Doomsday Device
programme.desc: A top-secret military base hidden deep in the ice beyond the Arctic Circle is one of the Cold War's most elaborate cover-ups, and recently declassified documents reveal its deadly purpose, and the threat it might still pose to all humankind.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Mysteries of Vanishing Paradise
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise and a once thriving South African community are now all mysteriously deserted and desolate landscapes; experts investigate the secrets of these remarkable places to uncover how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Haunting of Heartbreak Castle
programme.desc: Experts investigate what was once a fairy-tale castle, but now is abandoned, and rumored to be haunted. They uncover secrets of the ancient fortress, and its ghostly stories.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Kingdom of the Vanished
programme.desc: A mysterious town in the hills of South Africa was once a booming community, but today, the eerie place is deserted. Experts reveal the cataclysm that caused the people of this once-prosperous town to suddenly leave and never come back.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Labyrinth of the Dead
programme.desc: Tunnels filled with human bones lie beneath the streets of Paris, and this horrifying engineering marvel points to a dark secret. New discoveries reveal why this grisly underground death maze was built, and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of Mafia Island
programme.desc: A Mediterranean island paradise is not all that it seems; its complex of abandoned buildings were once prisons for the world's most dangerous Mafiosi; experts investigate new evidence to reveal who was imprisoned here and the secrets they left behind.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Greatest Treasures
programme.desc: The world's leading experts on ancient Egypt reveal the greatest treasures and discoveries of the great empire of the Nile.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Search for Nefertiti's Mummy
programme.desc: New technology might help experts track down Nefertiti's missing mummy, an investigation that could reveal new secrets about one of ancient Egypt's most powerful women.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Caligula: Sex, Lies, and Empire
programme.desc: Legendary tales depict Caligula as the most notorious emperor in ancient Roman history, and now, new evidence uncovers the truth behind these lurid stories, revealing an astonishing story of murder, intrigue, and dynastic family power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Pompeii: After Apocalypse
programme.desc: The latest scientific investigations reveals the untold story of how a cataclysmic eruption transformed an entire region.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Caligula: Sex, Lies, and Empire
programme.desc: Legendary tales depict Caligula as the most notorious emperor in ancient Roman history, and now, new evidence uncovers the truth behind these lurid stories, revealing an astonishing story of murder, intrigue, and dynastic family power.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Secrets of the Alien Relic
programme.desc: A strange, alien artifact discovered in the ruins of an ancient Greek shipwreck holds the secrets of a technology thousands of years ahead of its time. Now experts are using cutting-edge science to reveal what this mysterious device was used for.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Treasures of the Warrior King
programme.desc: The treasure trove of Sutton Hoo is one of the great discoveries from medieval Europe, and its mysteries conceal the secrets of a lost world; cutting-edge archaeology and an international expedition reveal the truth behind the riches of a warrior king.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter: Lt. Joe Kenda: Justified
programme.desc: A young man is found gunned down, leading Lt. Joe Kenda to delve into his troubled past and his connection to the world of rare coins. Then... a mother of five is shot in the head and it's up to Kenda to uncover the truth behind her untimely death.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: In Plain Sight
programme.desc: When a sexual predator is discovered hiding in plain sight, John helps police in the pursuit of dangerous James Meece; after a brutal home invasion, Cal goes into the field to help police track down the dangerous James Watts.

programme.title: See No Evil: All Eyes on Jordie
programme.desc: On April 10th 2016, Jordie Hudson vanishes after a night out with friends. The only clue police have is her glasses, which are discovered in a pool of blood. Surveillance footage shows a horrific attack.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Hate Being Daddy's Girl
programme.desc: When Robin Doll was rescued from her mother's violence and went to live with her father, she thought she had cheated death. She had no way of knowing that the man she looked to as her savior was hiding something even worse.

programme.title: Murder in Bowling Green
programme.desc: A Western Kentucky University freshman is assaulted and set on fire in her own dorm room. When police find out about a fraternity party on the night of her attack, they are faced with a growing list of suspects and motives.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Richard Davis runs up to an ambulance parked at a gas station, clutching a gunshot wound to his abdomen. He is rushed to a hospital, but sadly succumbs to his injuries and now it's up to Atlanta's elite homicide unit to figure out what happened.

programme.title: True Conviction: Protecting a Friend
programme.desc: Young mother Tyshika Askins is found dead in her home but after charging the wrong man, police knew the key to solving the case lies is an OJ container left out on a kitchen counter.

programme.title: Reasonable Doubt: High-Stakes Homicide
programme.desc: Pest control worker Kim Cain was convicted of murdering a 71-year-old Palm Beach socialite. The prosecution argued she found Cain stealing her jewelry to support a gambling addiction. Cain's family is hoping Chris and Fatima can prove his innocence.

programme.title: Atlanta Justice: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Richard Davis runs up to an ambulance parked at a gas station, clutching a gunshot wound to his abdomen. He is rushed to a hospital, but sadly succumbs to his injuries and now it's up to Atlanta's elite homicide unit to figure out what happened.

programme.title: True Conviction: Protecting a Friend

programme.title: Murder in Bowling Green
programme.desc: A Western Kentucky University freshman is assaulted and set on fire in her own dorm room. When police find out about a fraternity party on the night of her attack, they are faced with a growing list of suspects and motives.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Hidden Evil
programme.desc: After years in foster care, Shannon Stafford longs for love and a family. When she meets Nathan Mitchell and his parents she thinks her search is over. Soon after they marry Nathan she learns that her new "loving family" has no love for her at all.

programme.title: Evil In-Law: Love's Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Shawna Smith marries Ryan Sorenson, a young man she always considered to be just a friend. But they are shocked when Ryan shows up in Shawna's hometown armed with two handguns and deadly intentions.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: Selfish Desires
programme.desc: Rebecca Osborne appears charming as she pursues widower Jerry Barker, but disaster is in store for her new groom. Jerry's children fear the worst when they uncover their stepmother's dark secret, which alludesto what's to come for their loving dad.

programme.title: Evil Stepmothers: She Can't Hide
programme.desc: Beautiful Elisa Redelsberger appears eager to start a new life when she meets softhearted lawyer and devoted father, Larry McNabney. But few suspect the depth of evil behind Elisa's façade until she pulls off the ultimate disappearing act.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: The Bloodiest Bond
programme.desc: What starts as a childhood friendship between identical twin sisters and the older neighborhood boy they both like turns into a turbulent adult romance, and a cry for help that ends in murder.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Dead Ringers
programme.desc: The Beck twins spend their entire lives side by side in the same house, until the day one of them decides that she's had enough.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Blood Brothers
programme.desc: A young woman is raped and murdered, and the case drags on for seven years. Twins, Brian and Alfred Calzacorto, become suspects when DNA puts them at the scene. But, identical twins with identical DNA mean authorities can't say prove who is guilty.

programme.title: Pandora's Box: Unleashing Evil: Blood and Oil
programme.desc: In 2012, a missing person case in North Dakota grabs the attention of Homeland Security. Investigators unravel a scheme involving stolen fracking profits, a ruthless conman and his murderous partner, and at least two victims of their boundless greed.

programme.title: Devil Among Us: Fire and Ice
programme.desc: A sniper shooting on an Alaskan highway leaves a young man dead and a community running scared. As one family grieves, another becomes hell-bent on revenge as they formulate an audacious plot.

programme.title: Predator at Large: Watch Your Children
programme.desc: In the summer of 2002, five-year-old Samantha Runnion is playing with a friend in front of their homes in Stanton, California. Suddenly, a man appears and snatches Samantha, dragging her into his car. The race is on to find her - and the man responsible.

programme.title: Someone You Thought You Knew: The Wolf and the Sheep
programme.desc: Kevin and Tabatha Bryant are a picture-perfect couple, living with their two young sons in Penfield, New York. But when Tabatha is found stabbed to death at home, a steamy affair and many double lives are revealed to the town's unsuspecting residents.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Gettysburg
programme.desc: An elite band of Yankee Sharpshooters must stop Robert E. Lee's Alabamian shock troops from flanking the Union line and winning the battle of Gettysburg and perhaps the entire Civil War.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Nashville
programme.desc: In a daring attempt to regain the upper hand in the Civil War, Confederate forces try to retake the city of Nashville and sever the supply line that's feeding the Union invasion of the south.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Justice for MLK: The Hunt for James Earl Ray
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the assassination of Martin Luther King and the desperate search for his killer which was (and remains to this day) the biggest, most extensive manhunt ever conducted, and the first to use forensic techniques.

programme.title: Impact of Hate: Charlottesville
programme.desc: Charlottesville votes to remove its confederate statues, and the Far Right descends for 2017's Unite the Right Rally. As concerned citizens gather against an influx of hate, a car plows into a crowd, killing Heather Heyer, on her first demonstration.

programme.title: Justice for MLK: The Hunt for James Earl Ray
programme.desc: The remarkable story of the assassination of Martin Luther King and the desperate search for his killer which was (and remains to this day) the biggest, most extensive manhunt ever conducted, and the first to use forensic techniques.

programme.title: The Civil War: Brothers Divided: Battle of Petersburg
programme.desc: The Union invasion of the south has ground to a halt at the seemingly impregnable ring of trenches built around Petersburg, Virginia. After eight bloody attempts to storm them have failed, two officers from Vermont will lead a daring raid.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Weaponology: Artillery
programme.desc: Artillery is ever present on the battlefield, and always evolving to keep pace with warfare. From catapults to cannons, ballista to battleships, gunpowder to giant super guns, chart the evolution of this powerful dynasty of destruction.

programme.title: Weaponology: Bomber
programme.desc: In eight decades man went from the invention of powered flight to the B2 Stealth bomber.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The Abrams Tank
programme.desc: The M1 Abrams tank is the world's most potent armored vehicle. Track its development through such forerunners as the WWII-era M18 Hellcat and the Cold War-era Soviet T-55 tank and see why these 'beast-boxes' have ruled ground warfare for decades.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: The SAW
programme.desc: The light machine gun launched mobile warfare by blending massive firepower with the portability of a rifle. See the evolution of this revolutionary weapon from its use in World War I to its modern incarnation: the SAW or Squad Automatic Weapon.

programme.title: Legends of the West: Bass Reeves: The Real Lone Ranger
programme.desc: Bass Reeves is no ordinary lawman. A slave set free by the Civil War, he hunts outlaws in the most dangerous territory in the nation. There is striking evidence that this fearless, legendary rider is the basis for the iconic character of the Lone Ranger.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Billy the Kid: The Phantom of Lincoln County
programme.desc: On a bloodstained frontier where corruption is king, an unlikely hero becomes a crusader for justice and revenge. By the time of his death at the age of 21, everyone in the country had heard of Billy the Kid.

programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Family's Empty Nest
programme.desc: A family has the resources to give their Lincolnville, Maine, cabin the love it deserves now that their four children are almost done with college. However the cabin has been neglected for 25 years and corners were cut in the original build.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Family Cabin Fit for a King
programme.desc: The team has $50,000 to renovate a camp that's four-times the size their usual builds. After a series of delays, the crew needs an extension on their deadline. The cabin gets a complete exterior and interior facelift including an outdoor checkerboard.

programme.desc: Chase and his team of Maine builders have been called in to renovate a camp uniquely located on two ponds. With winter right around the corner, Chase knows they need to hustle in order to complete the renovation.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Golden Years Family Camp

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Legacy Preserved
programme.desc: The crew pay tribute to an entomologist and late matriarch of an amazing legacy in West Gardiner, Maine, by restoring two rustic cabins on her 113-acre Wakefield Wildlife Sanctuary.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Diamond in the Rough
programme.desc: After three women collectively buy a cabin they describe as 'a diamond in the rough on a pretty lot,' they are determined to prove the naysayers wrong and create the cabin of their dreams.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Roberts
programme.desc: A man and his fiancé would like to see their rustic camping cabin without plumbing transformed into a place they can entertain, use the bathroom indoors and enjoy multiple seasons.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Big Sur Modern Retreat
programme.desc: A nature-loving architect builds a modern California cabin that rivals the views of nearby Big Sur!

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Cabin of No Return
programme.desc: An outdoorsy family of three is determined to build a mammoth off-grid cabin along Idaho's Salmon River after one of their properties was destroyed by a fire. The family takes on rapids to portage out materials and must finish before low tide hits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Desert Domes
programme.desc: Laura Williams is on a mission to build an off-the-grid home in the desert outside of Tucson, Arizona. She builds an earthen three-dome home by hand battling a steep learning curve and Mother Nature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Maine Straw Bale Cabin
programme.desc: An eco-friendly couple fights an early winter to build a timber and straw-bale cabin in Maine.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: The Whole Hog
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson goes hog-wild all day with dishes that use every single part of the pig. Simple strips of bacon for breakfast just won't do, and forget about basic barbecue. These are the perfect porky portions for an entire day of pigging out.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: United Tastes of America
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson is the guide on a mouthwatering trip to sample all the classic, iconic dishes of America. From delicious desserts on the Florida coast to spicy-hot chili in the Lone Star State, this is the best way to experience the USA.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Spice Up Your Life
programme.desc: Forget about standard spicy seasonings. Eddie Jackson rounds up dishes made with the hottest, zippiest and peppiest peppers out there.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer: Deep-Fried Frenzy
programme.desc: Nothing's better than a little batter and hot oil. Eddie Jackson tracks down the crunchiest, most-delectable deep-fried foods that will put any food lover in a total frenzy.

programme.title: Good Eats: Kinda Blue (Blueberry)
programme.desc: Alton Brown reveals the secrets to turning the blueberry into a year-round treat.

programme.title: Good Eats: Bean Stalker
programme.desc: Alton reinvents the classic green bean casserole just in time to save the holidays.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dillicious
programme.desc: Alton helps a humble cucumber fulfill its culinary destiny of becoming a pickle.

programme.title: Good Eats: American Slicer
programme.desc: Join host Alton Brown as he explores what it takes to stay sharp in the kitchen and demystifies the relationship between the cook and his cutlery, with a recipe for Gazpacho.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Charleston
programme.desc: Andrew explores coastal classics like shrimp and grits, she-crab soup, and barbecue.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Louisville, Kentucky
programme.desc: Andrew explores Louisville icons like country ham, burgoo stew, and derby pie.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Birmingham
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Birmingham, Alabama, home to one of the fastest growing food scenes in America. From the state's signature barbecue to innovative takes on Southern cuisine, he gets a taste of what makes the Magic City so unique.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Miami
programme.desc: Andrew travels to Miami, Florida, where the food scene fuses new ideas with old classics. From sizzling Cuban dishes to Peruvian bites with a glitzy Miami twist, Andrew immerses himself in the bold and mouthwatering flavors of Latin America.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Sitka
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the cuisine of Sitka, Alaska, where the preparation of iconic Alaskan staples like king salmon, venison and rockfish has evolved with finesse.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Cape Town
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern leaves no meal unexplored in multicultural Cape Town, South Africa, where meat comes in all forms, from sausage to stew to pie. The coastal city's seafood is out of this world, and the favorite pastry is nothing without a coat of syrup!

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mauritius
programme.desc: From piping-hot fried dumplings and handmade egg noodles to veggie-stuffed flatbread and curried swordfish, Andrew Zimmern showcases the flavorful fusions of the island paradise of Mauritius.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Inside Job
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro discovers how they get the filling on the inside by watching how Parla chicken and spinach ravioli is made. Then he gets the lowdown on Lovely Candy Company's superfruit chews and finds out what's in a Colt's Bolt.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Layers Of Flavors

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Finger Foods
programme.desc: Put down your fork and get ready to pick up some amazing finger food facts! Michael McKean has things handled, finding out how appetizers found their footing during Prohibition, that a king turned tapas into a tableside treat.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Gadgets And Gizmos
programme.desc: Michael McKean has gadgets and gizmos a'plenty, and he's ready to show them all off! Discover that waffle irons were once incredible artists and the stand mixer almost went overboard, and find out why refrigerators could have been left out in the cold.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Dip It Good
programme.desc: Cozy up with a bowl of chips because host Michael McKean has the scoop on our favorite dips. He'll discover that guacamole wouldn't be good without a mailman, queso almost started a civil war and chocolate fountains are full of physics.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Vegas, Baby!
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean has a date with Lady Luck and is ready to go all-in on some tempting Vegas eats. He'll find out how prime rib lured us all to Sin City, and why prohibition poured us all a shrimp cocktail.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: War and Peace
programme.desc: Michael McKean gets caught in the middle of some culinary conflicts as he uncovers some very delicious details. He solves the Cuban Missile Crisis with chop suey, runs the redcoats out with cornbread and keeps the peace with a little kimchi.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Play With Your Food
programme.desc: Michael McKean turns our plates into a playground as he finds out the stories behind some famously fun foods! He'll spell out a solution to the Great Depression using alphabet soup and more.

programme.title: Good Eats: Orange Aid
programme.desc: Oranges aren't just for juice any more as host Alton Brown explores their symphony of flavours to create a classic drink, a tasty topping and a creamy cold dessert.

programme.title: Good Eats: Pantry Raid X: The Dark Side of the Cane
programme.desc: Alton shows how to cook with molasses instead of sugar.

programme.title: Good Eats: Gills Gone Wild
programme.desc: Wild salmon can be a shock to the budget but host Alton Brown proves that it is worth every penny if properly and simply prepared.

programme.title: Good Eats: Tender Is the Pork

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation IV: Crawfish
programme.desc: Alton Brown discovers the sustainable alternative to lobster, the crawfish.

programme.desc: Gang is off to a visit at Phineas and Ferb's grandparents at their lake house.

programme.title: Amphibia: Quarreler's Pass/ Toadcatcher

programme.title: Amphibia: Truck Stop Polly/ A Caravan Named Desire
programme.desc: Feeling unappreciated by her family, Polly hatches a plan to make them pay attention to her. Hop Pop signs the family up to join a traveling theater troupe, hoping to realize his dream of being an actor.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: For Your Ice Only/ Happy New Year

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Traffic Cam Caper/ Bowl-R-Rama Drama
programme.desc: Candace tried to prove her brothers inventions by getting footage from a traffic camera.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dipper vs. Manliness

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Legend of the Gobblewonker

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons

programme.desc: Phineas and Ferb organize 'The F Games' for Buford and Isabella.

programme.title: Amphibia: Handy Anne/ Fort in the Road
programme.desc: Worried that something bad could happen while they are in Newtopia, Anne decides to disaster-proof the farm. Later, Sprig longs for exotic road trip adventures, but Hop Pop's strict road rules threaten to spoil all of his fun plans.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives

programme.title: Maury: I Have 14 Children ... But Your Baby Is Not Mine!
programme.desc: Mother of nine, Tremaine, wants to prove her ex Marquis is the father of her youngest daughter. Joe thinks Brooke cheated whenever they argued, and that her baby is not his. Juarez's new girl Jazmyne says Sade is pawning her baby on him to drag him down.

programme.title: Mike & Molly: Carl Has Issues
programme.desc: Carl is confronted with his fear of commitment when he and Christina attempt to take their relationship to the next level.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Doug Out
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie take Arthur to a Mets game and get arrested for catching a game ball.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Fun Factory
programme.desc: Max and Caroline select a factory to produce their cupcake T-shirts but become suspicious of the work conditions there due to their overly-enthusiastic employees.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Sherri Shepherd, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Natasha Leggero, and Bill Engvall.

programme.title: Black-ish: Martin Luther Skiing Day
programme.desc: On the way to the Johnson family's annual Martin Luther King holiday ski trip, Dre realizes his children may not know the significance of Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. so he decides to inundate them with Dr. King history facts.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sex, Lies and Vasectomies
programme.desc: Bow learns from her colleague that Dre never had the vasectomy a few years back that was supposedly scheduled, so she decides to see if he’ll come clean and tell the truth.

programme.title: All American: Seasons Pass
programme.desc: Spencer finds himself on the defense after an interview he gave comes out. Coop and Layla return from tour. Billy is excited for a fresh start at South Crestview High. Jordan and Simone struggle to say goodbye to someone they love.

programme.title: Batwoman: What Happened to Kate Kane?
programme.desc: Kate's friends and family hope Kate will be found. A homeless person find's Kate's Batsuit and uses the suit to go rogue in the streets of Gotham. Jacob Kane and Luke Fox launch searches for Kate. Mary Hamilton grapples with losing another family member.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Visa
programme.desc: Jerry is to blame for Babu's deportation to Pakistan; Kramer returns from fantasy camp.

programme.title: Seinfeld: The Andrea Doria
programme.desc: Elaine is aroused when she learns that her blind date has been stabbed. Jerry helps Newman get a transfer to Hawaii. After learning that his apartment has been given to an Andrea Doria survivor, George pleads his case with the tenant association.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Kissing Abraham Lincoln
programme.desc: Berta and Lydia fight for Charlie's allegiance after each thinks the other has crossed the line. Kandi uses her assets to distract Alan from selling the too-expensive condo they bought when they were married.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Castrating Sheep in Montana
programme.desc: Alan expects the worst when Berta learns that he's been seeing her daughter, Naomi, but Berta's reaction is surprising and much worse than Alan could have imagined.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Daddy Daughter Day
programme.desc: Just as a new school year begins, Murray and Erica's family tradition of spending the first Saturday together roller-skating is in jeopardy since Erica has turned into a moody teenager and believes the activity is juvenile.

programme.title: Mom: Dropped Soap and a Big Guy on a Throne
programme.desc: Christy and Bonnie face temptation when Bonnie is prescribed pain medication for a back injury.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Outdoor Man Grill
programme.desc: Now that Vanessa is following her passion to become an inner-city high school teacher, Mike is inspired to rekindle his dream of opening up a fish and game restaurant in the Outdoor Man store.

programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Mom: Charlotte Bronte and a Backhoe
programme.desc: Bonnie locks horns with Jill's 'inner strength' coach, Miranda. Also, Christy struggles to bounce back after being rejected from law school.

programme.desc: Man sues for cost of auto insurance deductible; woman seeks reimbursement of an urn.

programme.desc: A woman accuses a gym of being responsible for her illness; another woman fails to follow through on a promise of financial support.

programme.title: Protection Court: Argued Over Insurance/ Slap Yes, Punch No

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Welcome to Tinseltown/ The Faulty Fitness Center
programme.desc: Promotional model sues for breach of contract; Man blames landlord after he is injured using fitness equipment at apartment complex.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Connally vs. Haskel
programme.desc: A Washington, DC singer is certain he's not the father and even wrote a song about it. But, will he have to sing a different tune when the DNA test results are read?

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Williams Jr. vs. Davis
programme.desc: A one-night-stand comes back to haunt a Missouri man who's accused of getting a woman pregnant three years ago.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A landlord sues her tenant for unpaid rent, property damage, and unpaid utilities; the tenant says he never saw a lease, and is only liable for the electricity bill. A relationship gone afoul leads to an ex-boyfriend being sued for $4571.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The plaintiff and her son say the defendant may be her son’s father, so they have petitioned the court for a paternity test.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Segments include 'Losing Her Cool ' and ' Having Sticky Fingers.'

programme.title: The People's Court

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Last Man Standing Wins/ Bridal VIP
programme.desc: An old high school track rivalry leads to a present-day injury. Woman is accused of not paying her fair share for a party.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: Joshua is suing Ryan for damaging his car. Then, Mary-Kate and Alexis want their security and pet deposits back from Thomas, but Thomas says they were used to defray the cost of damages, cleaning and painting of the property.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: DNA: It's Time to Act Like a Father
programme.desc: After a four-year divorce, Donald and ex-wife Yolanda had a one-night stand. Now, Yolanda believes that night was when her child was conceived, but Donald denies being the father. Also, Carl denies being the father of Denise's child.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Tok'ra
programme.desc: Captain Samantha Carter has a vivid dream, in which she sees through the eyes of Jolinar.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Tok'ra
programme.desc: Samantha Carter's father, who is dying of cancer, agrees to become a host for a Tok'ra.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Spirits

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Touchstone
programme.desc: The SG-1 team uncover a government agenda that has sinister implications.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: The Fifth Race
programme.desc: A mysterious device fills O'Neill's mind with the knowledge of the Ancients. He soon begins to speak their language and act impulsively based on the new information, but if he doesn't get rid of it, he will die.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: A Matter of Time
programme.desc: The SG-1 team and the Earth become threatened by a black hole's gravitational pull.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: The Haven
programme.desc: When a high-tech building malfunctions, neighbors are forced to work together.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: Déjà Vu
programme.desc: A doctor builds a teleportation device that uses nuclear weapons to open a wormhole.

programme.title: Sliders: The Seer
programme.desc: The Sliders discover they are the subjects of a fanatical religion known as Slidology.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: Blind Faith
programme.desc: Sam becomes a blind pianist who must save his assistant Michele from being murdered.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: Good Morning, Peoria
programme.desc: Sam must save a radio station when rock and roll is banned.

programme.title: Quantum Leap: Thou Shalt Not. . . .
programme.desc: Sam is a Rabbi who must help a family resolve their anger and guilt issues.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Holiday
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters Machello, an old inventor who is wanted by the Goa'uld for crimes against the System Lords. One of his inventions allows him to swap bodies with Daniel, but no one notices until it is too late.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Serpent's Song
programme.desc: Apophis, who is pursued by a powerful Goa'uld, begs the team to grant him sanctuary.

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: One False Step
programme.desc: The SG-1's presence in an alien community causes a mysterious illness.

programme.title: Dust
programme.desc: Thought-provoking live-action and animated shorts explore the future from many points of view. Science fiction takes on an exciting and visually stunning medium.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Resurrection Ship Part 2
programme.desc: Differences are put aside as both Battlestars unite in order to fight against the Cylons. Baltar is interested in Gina.

programme.title: Battlestar Galactica: Epiphanies
programme.desc: As President Roslin nears death, Dr. Gaius Baltar must be groomed for the worst case scenario. Roslin orders the death of Sharon's unborn child. A sabotaged Viper leads to an investigation that uncovers a movement of people seeking peace with the Cylons.
